name: 奥斯曼枪手
description_en: Ottoman infantry unit that inflicts siege damage. Good against infantry.
description: 造成围攻破坏的奥斯曼步兵部队。擅长对抗步兵。

name: 骨头军团
description_en: Elite swordsmen of the Circle of Ossus.
description: 精锐的藏骨集团剑兵。

name: 骨头军团
description_en: Elite musketeer of the Circle of Ossus.
description: 精锐的藏骨集团火枪兵。

name: 老练葡萄牙长枪兵
description_en: Skirmisher with low hitpoints, but a strong attack. Good against infantry.
description: 长枪兵，生命值较低，但是攻击力强大，并且擅长对付步兵。

name: 重型加农炮
description_en: Heavy artillery. Good against infantry or buildings.\nCan only be trained at the Factory or shipped from the Home City.
description: 重装炮兵单位，擅长对付步兵或建筑。\n只能在工厂训练，或从主城运送过来。

name: 独木舟
description_en: Native boat that can attack or transport units.
description: 原住民小船，可以攻击或运输单位。

name: 卡拉维尔战舰
description_en: Caravel. Good at exploring, fishing or transport.
description: 卡拉维尔战舰，适用于进行探索、捕鱼或运输。

name: 骑射手
description_en: Ranged cavalry. Good against cavalry.
description: 远程骑兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 哥萨克骑兵
description_en: Russian hand cavalry.
description: 俄罗斯近战骑兵。

name: 森林酷民
description_en: Expensive but powerful villager who gathers fast.
description: 成本昂贵但强大的村民，收集资源的速度很快。

name: 克里森林酷民
description_en: Expensive but powerful villager who gathers fast.
description: 成本昂贵但强大的村民，收集资源的速度很快。

name: 弩手
description_en: Archaic archer. Good against infantry.
description: 古老的步弓手单位，擅长对付步兵。

name: 胸甲骑兵
description_en: Heavy cavalry with a trample attack.
description: 会发起践踏攻击的重装骑兵。

name: 长管炮
description_en: Light artillery. Good against other artillery.
description: 轻型炮兵单位，擅长对付其他炮兵。

name: 阿布恩
description_en: Abun. Heals injured units from range and during battle. May be tasked to gather at a Mountain Monastery.
description: 阿布恩。可在战斗中远程治疗负伤的单位。可被派到山地寺院进行采集。

name: 强盗双体艇
description_en: Bandit boat that can attack or transport units.
description: 强盗船只，可以攻击或运输单位。

name: 村民
description_en: Villager that constructs buildings and gathers resources.
description: 建造建筑和收集资源的村民。

name: 海盗神射手
description_en: Agile corsair skirmisher with high ranged armor. Good against heavy infantry and light ranged cavalry.
description: 海盗长枪兵动作敏捷，远程护甲高。擅长对抗重装步兵和轻型远程骑兵。

name: 建筑师
description_en: Can slowly construct buildings for free, or very quickly if the foundation is paid for.
description: 可以免费地缓慢建造建筑，如果支付了地基费用，则可以非常迅速地建造建筑。

name: 奥斯曼步兵
description_en: Heavy infantry. Good against cavalry. Armed with a bow to counter light cavalry at range.
description: 重装步兵。善于对抗骑兵。装备弓箭，可以对付射程内的轻型骑兵。

name: 柏柏尔步弓手
description_en: Archaic long-ranged archer. Good against infantry.
description: 古老的远程步弓手单位，擅长对付步兵。

name: 部落骑兵
description_en: Tribal Horseman with low population costs.
description: 低人口成本的部落骑兵。

name: 巴巴里海盗
description_en: Pirate from the Barbary Coast.
description: 巴巴里海岸的海盗。

name: 柏柏尔火绳枪兵
description_en: Skirmisher with low hitpoints, but a long-ranged attack. Good against infantry.
description: 长枪兵，生命值较低，但是攻击范围广，并且擅长对付步兵。

name: 柏柏尔长矛兵
description_en: Local peasant infantry armed with spears. Good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 装备长矛的当地农民步兵，擅长攻击骑兵和建筑。

name: 战斗独木舟
description_en: Battle Canoe. Powerful, agile warship that can also train units.
description: 战斗独木舟。一艘强大、敏捷的军舰，可以训练单位。

name: 贝都因骑马弓兵
description_en: Ranged cavalry. Good against cavalry.
description: 远程骑兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 神射手
description_en: Skirmisher trained to move fast. Sounds a bugle after defeating an enemy to stun foes and boost ally speed.
description: 训练有素的长枪兵移动速度很快。击败一个敌人后会鸣响号角，眩晕其他敌人并提升盟友的速度。

name: 掷石绳战士
description_en: Ranged warrior who hurls bolas for a wide area of effect. The bola slows down enemies. Good against cavalry.
description: 会猛力投出掷石绳的远程攻击战士，攻击范围较广。掷石绳能减慢敌军的速度。擅长对付骑兵。

name: 募集弓箭手
description_en: Quick-training foot archer who loses hitpoints over time, but gains attack speed at lower health.
description: 生命值随时间减少，但攻击速度随时间增加、训练速度较快的步弓手。

name: 加农炮船
description_en: Cannon Boat. Somewhat expensive, but powerful boat good at blasting ships and buildings from a distance.
description: 加农炮船。一种造价昂贵，但战斗力强悍的战船，擅长从远处炮击船只和建筑。

name: 卡尔远征军
description_en: Swedish Musketeer that fires quickly and counters cavalry from range. Can charge quickly with his sword equipped. Good in melee combat.
description: 瑞典火枪兵能够快速开火，并且能从远处反击骑兵，还能够使用随身的佩剑发动冲锋。很擅长近战攻击。

name: 卡尔远征军
description_en: Swedish Musketeer that fires quickly and counters cavalry from range. Can charge quickly with his sword equipped. Good in melee combat.
description: 瑞典火枪兵能够快速开火，并且能从远处反击骑兵，还能够使用随身的佩剑发动冲锋。很擅长近战攻击。

name: 海螺信使
description_en: Inca scout with a great deal of utility. Good against Treasure Guardians and can construct various buildings.
description: 具有多种能力的印加侦察兵。擅长对付宝藏守护者，并且能够建造多种建筑。

name: 普林茨近卫轻骑兵
description_en: Ranged Light Cavalry with a deadly hand attack. Good against Heavy Cavalry.
description: 远程轻型骑兵，具有致命的近战攻击能力。擅长对付重装骑兵。

name: 游击叛兵
description_en: Heavy cavalry armed with a lance for extra range. Good against skirmishers, and holds its own against cavalry.
description: 重装骑兵，因装备长矛而攻击范围更大。擅长对付长枪兵，并能在对付骑兵时不落下风。

name: 钦查木筏
description_en: Strong seagoing raft firing multiple projectiles.
description: 坚固的海上木筏，可以发射多发炮弹。

name: 红衫军
description_en: Solid general-purpose infantry. Good against cavalry.
description: 优良的全方位步兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 巴格达奥斯曼步兵
description_en: Heavy infantry. Good against cavalry. Armed with a bow to counter light cavalry at range.
description: 重装步兵。善于对抗骑兵。装备弓箭，可以对付射程内的轻型骑兵。

name: 葡萄牙长枪兵
description_en: Skirmisher with low hitpoints, but a strong attack. Good against infantry.
description: 长枪兵，生命值较低，但是攻击力强大，并且擅长对付步兵。

name: 反制步枪兵
description_en: Specialized Light Infantry that only counters other Light Infantry, but does so very effectively.
description: 特种轻型步兵，只能反制其他轻型步兵，但效果十分显著。

name: 俄国骑射手
description_en: Ranged cavalry. Good against cavalry.
description: 远程骑兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 长弓兵
description_en: Archaic long-ranged archer. Good against infantry.
description: 古老的远程步弓手单位，擅长对付步兵。

name: 俄国重骑兵
description_en: Fast cavalry good at raiding villagers or buildings.
description: 行动快速的骑兵单位，擅长对付村民或攻击建筑。

name: 迈索尔火箭炮
description_en: Heavy artillery that fires a rocket and is good against infantry or buildings.\nCan only be trained at the Factory or shipped from the Home City.
description: 发射火箭炮的重装炮兵单位，擅长对付步兵或建筑。\n只能在工厂训练，或从主城运送过来。

name: 墨西哥士兵
description_en: Very sturdy, but slow training, Heavy Infantry armed with a musket and grenades.
description: 非常强壮、但训练缓慢的重装步兵，装备有火枪和手榴弹。

name: 反制枪骑兵
description_en: Light Russian elite ranged cavalry that can dismount to counter infantry. Good against artillery and cavalry, particularly other light cavalry.
description: 俄罗斯精锐远程轻骑兵可下马对抗步兵。擅长对付炮兵和骑兵，尤其是其他轻骑兵。

name: 反制步枪兵
description_en: Russian elite counter skirmisher that can mount to counter cavalry. Good against light cavalry and infantry, especially other skirmishers.
description: 俄国精锐反制长枪兵，可以骑上坐骑变为反制骑兵。擅长对付轻型骑兵和步兵，尤其擅长对付其他长枪兵。

name: 奥斯曼轻骑兵
description_en: Ottoman hand cavalry with increased movement and attack speed.
description: 移动和攻击速度获得提升的奥斯曼近战骑兵。

name: 鹰侦察兵
description_en: Aztec scout that flings javelins from an atlatl. Helps the War Chief to explore the map and defeat treasure guardians.
description: 阿兹特克侦察兵，会从掷矛器掷射标枪。可帮助战酋探索地图和击败宝藏守护者。

name: 莱昂纳多的战车
description_en: Armored vehicle with cannons pointing in all directions. Let's have a ride on the merry-go-round!
description: 装甲车，装备有可指向四面八方的加农炮。让我们在旋转木马上兜兜风吧！

name: 木制牛
description_en: Wooden Cattle that can transport units and be harvested for wood. Explosive in contact.
description: 木制牛可以运输单位，也可以收获木材。接触易爆。

name: 劫匪
description_en: Stealthy Skirmisher that can see the location of enemies he recently damaged.
description: 行动隐蔽的长枪兵，可以看见自己近期攻击过的敌军位置。

name: 埃米尔
description_en: Royal Hausa hero with a fealty aura. Explores, fights, builds Palaces, Universities, and Trading Posts. Good against cavalry.
description: 带有忠诚光环的豪萨皇室英雄。可用于探索、战斗、建造宫殿、大学和交易站。擅长对付骑兵。

name: 埃米尔
description_en: Royal Hausa hero with a fealty aura. Explores, fights, builds Palaces, Universities, and Trading Posts. Good against cavalry.
description: 带有忠诚光环的豪萨皇室英雄。可用于探索、战斗、建造宫殿、大学和交易站。擅长对付骑兵。

name: 野牛
description_en: {E^Large bovine. Harvest for Food.^}{J^Large bovine. Attracted to nearby Shrines. Enhances resources generated by Shrines.^}
description: {E^大型牛科动物，可以捕获作为食物。^}{J^大型牛科动物，会被附近的神社所吸引，可以提高神社的资源产生速率。^}

name: 清教徒
description_en: Hardy settler that constructs buildings and gathers resources.
description: 吃苦耐劳的拓荒者，可以建造建筑和收集资源。

name: 州民兵
description_en: Skirmisher with low range that sacrifices attack for hitpoints. Gains additional hitpoints in groups.
description: 射程较短的长枪兵，其牺牲了攻击力来加强生命值，在集群时还会增加生命值。

name: 州民兵
description_en: Skirmisher with low range that sacrifices attack for hitpoints. Gains additional hitpoints in groups.
description: 射程较短的长枪兵，其牺牲了攻击力来加强生命值，在集群时还会增加生命值。

name: 拓荒者
description_en: Villager that constructs buildings and gathers resources.
description: 建造建筑和收集资源的村民。

name: 芬兰轻装骑兵
description_en: Light ranged cavalry from Finland with a powerful hand attack as well as a short-ranged attack inflicting area damage.
description: 来自芬兰的轻型远程骑兵，近战攻击能力很强，短程攻击可以造成区域伤害。

name: 捕鱼独木舟
description_en: Gathers Food from Fish or Coin from Whales.
description: 从鱼群捕鱼或从鲸鱼收集钱币。

name: 加特林机枪
description_en: Early automatic-fire weapon. Better against infantry than buildings.
description: 早期自动射击武器。擅长对付步兵，对建筑的攻击力稍差。

name: 轻骑兵
description_en: Hand cavalry armed with cold steel. Good against light infantry.
description: 装备锋利武器的近战骑兵单位，擅长对付轻型步兵。

name: 护卫德国骑兵
description_en: Hand cavalry that sacrifices hitpoints for attack.
description: 近战骑兵单位，牺牲了自己的生命值来加强攻击力。

name: 枪骑兵
description_en: Ranged cavalry. Good against cavalry.
description: 远程骑兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 掷弹兵
description_en: Light artillery that throws grenades to defeat infantry or buildings.
description: 轻型炮兵单位，投掷手榴弹来攻击步兵或建筑。

name: 马扎尔轻骑兵
description_en: Hand cavalry armed with cold steel. Good against light infantry and artillery.
description: 装备锋利武器的近战骑兵单位，擅长对付轻型步兵和炮兵。

name: 正规军
description_en: Heavy ranged infantry with greater range than other Musketeers. Armed with a bayonet to beat cavalry.
description: 拥有比其他火枪兵更远射程的重装远程步兵，装备有刺刀，可以反制骑兵。

name: 狙击手
description_en: Skirmisher with a long-ranged attack, but low hitpoints. Gains extra range per upgrade. Good against infantry.
description: 可以进行远程攻击的长枪兵，但是生命值较低。每次升级都会进一步增加射程。擅长对付步兵。

name: 州民兵
description_en: Skirmisher with low range that sacrifices attack for hitpoints. Gains additional hitpoints in groups.
description: 射程较短的长枪兵，其牺牲了攻击力来加强生命值，在集群时还会增加生命值。

name: 卡宾枪骑兵
description_en: Ranged light cavalry equipped with a carbine repeater. Good against Heavy Cavalry and Artillery.
description: 装备有连射卡宾枪的远程轻型骑兵。擅长对付重装骑兵和炮兵。

name: 富拉尼步弓手
description_en: Foot Archer armed with a short bow for a fast attack. Good against Heavy Infantry and Ranged Cavalry. Can gather Livestock.
description: 手持短弓、可快速攻击的步弓手。擅长对抗重装步兵和远程骑兵。可以收集牲畜。

name: 三桅帆装军舰
description_en: Galleass. Slow, powerful ship resistant to building fire that can train units.
description: 三桅帆装军舰。行动缓慢，但威力强大的船只，不但可以抵抗敌人从建筑中发起的攻击，还能训练单位。

name: 加塞尼亚步兵
description_en: Heavy ranged infantry that throws javelins faster at closer targets. Good against cavalry in melee.
description: 重装远程步兵，向较近的目标投掷标枪的速度更快。擅长近战攻击骑兵。

name: 将军
description_en: The hero of your civilization. Explores, fights, builds Forts and Trading Posts. Cannot die. If he falls unconscious, he can be rescued.
description: 您的文明拥有的英雄，他会探索、战斗、建造堡垒和交易站。他不会死亡，当他因昏迷而倒下时，您可以派人去救他。

name: 将军
description_en: The hero of your civilization. Explores, fights, builds Forts and Trading Posts. Cannot die. If he falls unconscious, he can be rescued.
description: 您的文明拥有的英雄，他会探索、战斗、建造堡垒和交易站。他不会死亡，当他因昏迷而倒下时，您可以派人去救他。

name: 大师
description_en: The hero of your civilization. Explores, fights, builds Fortifications and Trading Posts. Cannot die. If he falls unconscious, he can be rescued.
description: 您的文明所拥有的英雄，他会探索、战斗、建造防御工事和交易站。他不会死亡，当他倒下而不省人事时，您可以派人去救他。

name: 说书人
description_en: Griot. Inspiring musician and storyteller who can increase the work rate of buildings and speed of nearby units. Uses instruments to intimidate enemies which slows their attack speed.
description: 说书人。鼓舞人心的音乐家和叙事人，可用于提高建筑的工作效率和周围单位的速度。可使用乐器恐吓敌人，降低敌方单位的攻击速度。

name: 募集枪手
description_en: Musketeer who loses hitpoints, becoming less effective over time.
description: 火枪兵，其生命值会随时间减少，攻击力也会随之下降。

name: 火焰兵
description_en: Light Infantry that attacks with incendiary weapons which inflict burning damage. Counters Heavy Infantry and Light Cavalry.
description: 用燃烧型武器攻击敌人的轻型步兵，会造成燃烧伤害。反制重装步兵和轻型骑兵。

name: 医院骑士团骑士
description_en: A Knight of Malta armed with a great sword. Absorbs some of the damage inflicted to nearby allies. Faster near Buildings.
description: 持巨剑的马耳他骑士，可吸收附近盟友所承受的部分伤害。在建筑物附近移动速度更快。

name: 铁帽炮兵
description_en: Heavy grenade-throwing infantryman that is effective against buildings and artillery, but more vulnerable to infantry and cavalry.
description: 投掷手榴弹的重型步兵，对建筑物和炮兵很有效，但更容易受到步兵和骑兵的攻击。

name: 秘鲁狗
description_en: Peruvian Hairless Dog. A smart and agile canine that obeys commands.
description: 秘鲁的无毛狗。一只聪明、敏捷且服从命令的犬类。

name: 奇穆游击兵
description_en: Fast moving warrior armed with a mace. Can easily get out of fights. Good against skirmishers and artillery.
description: 以槌矛为武器且行动敏捷的战士，能迅速从战事中脱身。擅于对付长枪兵和炮兵。

name: 羽饰长矛兵
description_en: Heavy infantry armed with a feathered spear. Good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 装备有羽饰长矛的重装步兵，擅长对付骑兵和建筑。

name: 战酋
description_en: The leader of your Tribe. Possesses many powerful bonuses and abilities. Explores, fights, builds Town Centers, Strongholds and Tambos.
description: 部落领袖，拥有许多强大的加成效果和能力。可以用来探险、战斗、建造城镇中心、大本营和印加驿站。

name: 叛乱者
description_en: An insurgent peasant armed with whatever they could find. Good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 就地取材的叛乱农民，擅长攻击骑兵和建筑。

name: 标枪骑兵
description_en: Ranged cavalry. Good against hand cavalry, particularly in melee.
description: 远程骑兵。擅长对付近战骑兵，近战攻击时特别强大。

name: 丛林弓箭手
description_en: Foot Archer with envenomed arrows which inflict poison damage over time. Good against Heavy Infantry and Light Ranged Cavalry.
description: 配有毒箭的步弓手能够造成持续性的中毒伤害。很适合对付重装步兵和轻型远程骑兵。

name: 后备兵
description_en: Affordable German ranged infantry armed with a rifle. Inflicts higher base damage at the expense of less bonus damage.
description: 经济的德国远程步兵，装备步枪。以牺牲较少的额外伤害为代价造成更高的基础伤害。

name: 皮革加农炮
description_en: Light affordable artillery that can fire and reposition quickly. Good against infantry.
description: 经济的轻型炮兵单位，可以快速开火并调整位置。擅长对付步兵。

name: 枪骑兵
description_en: Ranged cavalry. Good against cavalry.
description: 远程骑兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 掷弹兵
description_en: Heavy siege infantryman that throws grenades to defeat infantry or buildings.
description: 重型攻城步兵单位，投掷手榴弹来攻击步兵或建筑。

name: 马扎尔轻骑兵
description_en: Hand cavalry armed with cold steel. Good against light infantry and artillery.
description: 装备锋利武器的近战骑兵单位，擅长对付轻型步兵和炮兵。

name: 利菲迪骑士
description_en: Heavy hand cavalry with a lot of hitpoints.
description: 生命值较高的重装近战骑兵。

name: 槌兵
description_en: Powerful Heavy hand infantry which inflicts area damage with a large bludgeon. Good against buildings, cavalry and anything within range.
description: 强大的重装近战步兵，持有巨大的棍棒，能造成范围伤害。擅长对付建筑、骑兵和处于攻击范围内的任何东西。

name: 迈加迪步兵
description_en: Powerful heavy ranged infantry bodyguard with a deadly melee attack.
description: 强悍的重装远程步兵保镖，可以施展致命的近战攻击。

name: 火战船
description_en: Fire Ship. Rams anything on the water and explodes.
description: 火战船，撞击水面上的任何东西，然后爆炸。

name: 卫士
description_en: Defensive Musketeer that may construct Outposts. Stronger near Buildings, especially Fortifications.
description: 可建造哨站的防御型火枪兵。在建筑尤其是防御工事附近时会变得更强。

name: 达荷美女战士
description_en: Battle-tested woman bodyguard mercenary of the Dahomey armed with rifle to counter infantry. Attacks faster at close range by throwing knives.
description: 久经沙场、装备有步枪的达荷美女保镳雇佣兵，能克制步兵。可通过投掷飞刀加快近距离攻击速度。

name: 非洲民兵
description_en: Powerful well-drilled African musketeer mercenary ready to restore order.
description: 训练有素的非洲雇佣火枪兵威力强大，他们准备着恢复这片大陆的秩序。

name: 战列舰
description_en: Battleship. A mighty Ship of the Line that rules the waves and everything on it.
description: 战列舰，这艘强大的风帆战列舰可以统治水上的一切。

name: 波斯尼亚兵
description_en: Mercenary lancer with a powerful lance attack that charges while fighting. Benefits from Combat Promotions, improving hitpoints and attack.
description: 雇佣长矛骑兵战斗时可以蓄力发动强力长矛攻击。可通过战斗力晋升提升其生命值和攻击力。

name: 爱尔兰准将
description_en: Affordable Musketeer from Ireland with a high hand attack. Benefits from promotions.
description: 来自爱尔兰的高性价比火枪兵，近战攻击高。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 炮手
description_en: Armored cannoneer mercenary who fires a heavy musket inflicting siege damage.
description: 身穿装甲的雇佣炮手，使用可以造成攻城伤害的重型火枪。

name: 被夺取的迫击炮
description_en: Artillery captured and operated by Native Americans. Fires an exploding shell at buildings or ships.
description: 被美洲原住民俘虏并操纵的炮兵单位，擅长以爆破弹攻击建筑或船只。

name: 战争单桅帆船
description_en: Powerful, heavy Mercenary Warship with very high hitpoints.
description: 威力强大的重型雇佣兵军舰，生命值非常高。

name: 加特林骆驼
description_en: Egyptian mercenary equipped with an automatic-fire gun mounted on a camel. Good against infantry, particularly Heavy Infantry.
description: 埃及雇佣兵，骑乘的骆驼身上装备有自动射击枪。擅长对付步兵，尤其是重装步兵。

name: 巨型掷弹兵
description_en: Heavy ranged infantry mercenary that inflicts area damage with its ranged attack.
description: 重装远程步兵雇佣兵，远程攻击造成范围伤害。

name: 火绳枪骑兵
description_en: Heavy cavalry mercenary with a powerful short ranged attack.
description: 可在近距离展开强力攻击的重装雇佣骑兵。

name: 爱尔兰准将
description_en: Affordable Musketeer from Ireland with a high hand attack. Benefits from promotions.
description: 来自爱尔兰的高性价比火枪兵，近战攻击高。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 卡努里护卫
description_en: Heavily armored Kanuri cavalryman mercenary skilled in the use of muskets. Good against heavy cavalry.
description: 身穿重型装甲的卡努里雇佣骑兵精通火枪，擅长对付重装骑兵。

name: 骑马步枪兵
description_en: Long ranged heavy cavalry mercenary. Strong against Infantry, especially Skirmishers. Countered by other cavalry.
description: 远程重装骑兵雇佣兵。反制步兵，尤其是长枪兵。受其他骑兵反制。

name: 拿破仑炮
description_en: Small but mighty field gun mercenary which moves and fires quickly. Has an additional case shot attack: extra powerful area damage attack which can only be used at very close range.
description: 小型而强大的野战炮雇佣兵，可快速移动并开火。还可以进行一次额外的榴霰弹攻击：超强范围伤害攻击，只能在极近距离使用。

name: 掠夺兵
description_en: Notorious Skirmisher from the Balkans that counters Skirmishers. Can use stealth.
description: 来自巴尔干半岛的恶名昭彰的长枪兵，反制长枪兵。可以使用隐匿。

name: 装甲手枪兵
description_en: Heavy ranged infantry mercenary from Savoy who uses his thick darkened armor to deflect some of the damage inflicted to nearby allies. Pistol attack deals area damage.
description: 来自萨伏依的重装远程步兵雇佣兵，利用厚厚的深色盔甲转移对附近盟友造成的部分伤害。拥有手枪攻击，造成范围伤害。

name: 皇家骑兵
description_en: Guard cavalry mercenary riding a heavy war horse that damages units while moving.
description: 护卫雇佣骑兵骑着重装战马，可在移动时对单位造成伤害。

name: 森纳尔骑兵
description_en: Heavy hand cavalry mercenary from Sudan with many hitpoints and dual armor. Good against light infantry and artillery.
description: 来自苏丹的重装近战雇佣骑兵，生命值较高并且身穿双重装甲。擅长对付轻型步兵和炮兵。

name: 三桅帆船
description_en: A powerful, agile mercenary warship that fires faster at close range. Inflicts high damage.
description: 一艘威力强大、行动敏捷的雇佣兵军舰，在近距离内可以快速开火。造成高额伤害。

name: 扎纳塔骑兵
description_en: Mercenary Rider of the Berber Zenata armed with a shield and javelins. Good against cavalry and artillery.
description: 柏柏尔扎纳塔的雇佣骑兵，手持盾牌和标枪。擅长对付骑兵和炮兵。

name: 义勇军
description_en: Zouave. High hitpoint multi-purpose ranged infantry mercenary. Fights well against all units.
description: 义勇军。拥有高生命值的多用途雇佣远距步兵。非常擅长对付所有单位。

name: 矿工
description_en: Gathers Coin extremely quickly from mines, but slowly from other Coin sources. Has a powerful grenade attack.
description: 从矿场收集钱币的速度极快，但从其他钱币来源收集钱币的速度缓慢。可以发动强大的手榴弹攻击。

name: 后备民兵
description_en: Quick-training, Minuteman who quickly loses hitpoints, becoming less effective over time.
description: 训练速度快的后备民兵，但生命值会随时间快速减少，攻击力也会随之下降。

name: 西班牙火枪兵
description_en: Heavy ranged infantry. Armed with a bayonet to beat cavalry.
description: 重装远程步兵，装备有一把刺刀来攻击骑兵。

name: 阿坎步弓手
description_en: Quick-training archer unit that loses hitpoints, becoming less effective over time.
description: 训练速度快的步弓手单位，但生命值会随时间快速减少，攻击力也会随之下降。

name: 阿坎安科比亚
description_en: Akan warrior firing a powerful old musket.
description: 阿坎战士使用的是威力强大的旧火枪。

name: 阿坎指挥官
description_en: Powerful African War Chief who gains strength from nearby Native Warriors. Can heal and build. Good against cavalry.
description: 威力强大的非洲战酋，可从附近的原住民战士身上得到强化。可以治疗和建造单位。擅长对付骑兵。

name: 柏柏尔苏丹人
description_en: Hero Berber Sultan. Gains attack and hitpoints from nearby Mercenaries and Outlaws.
description: 英雄柏柏尔苏丹。可从附近的雇佣兵和亡命之徒身上获得攻击力和生命值。

name: 马普切掷石绳骑兵
description_en: Mapuche ranged cavalry who hurls bolas to slow down enemies and inflict area damage. Good against cavalry.
description: 马普切远程骑兵，会利用掷石绳来拖慢敌人的行动速度并造成范围伤害。擅长对付骑兵。

name: 贵族铁骑
description_en: Heavy Hand Cavalry from Wallachia with good siege attack.
description: 来自瓦拉几亚的重装近战骑兵，具有强大的攻城攻击能力。

name: 布伦瑞克黑衣士兵
description_en: Swift Musketeer. Good against Cavalry. Benefits from promotions.
description: 迅捷火枪兵。擅长对付骑兵。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 柏柏尔骆驼骑兵
description_en: Berber light cavalry warrior riding a fast camel that terrifies horses. Good against cavalry and artillery. Countered by light infantry.
description: 柏柏尔轻型骑兵战士驾驭着轻快的骆驼，能够惊吓马匹。擅长对付骑兵和炮兵，但会被轻型步兵反制。

name: 近卫轻骑兵
description_en: Ranged Light Cavalry with a deadly hand attack. Good against Heavy Cavalry.
description: 远程轻型骑兵，具有致命的近战攻击能力。擅长对付重装骑兵。

name: 鼓手
description_en: Military musician who can inspire military units to move and attack faster.
description: 能鼓舞军事单位更快移动和进攻的军乐家。

name: 雅典卫兵
description_en: Greek Skirmisher with high hitpoints that is particularly strong against Heavy Infantry.
description: 具有高生命值的希腊长枪兵，尤其反制重装步兵。

name: 霍尔坎标枪手
description_en: Archaic heavy infantry. Good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 古老的重装步兵，擅长攻击骑兵和建筑。

name: 匈牙利掷弹兵
description_en: Heavy siege infantryman that throws grenades to defeat infantry or buildings.
description: 重型攻城步兵单位，投掷手榴弹来攻击步兵或建筑。

name: 线列步兵
description_en: Tactical Austrian Musketeer that gains different benefits in each stance as well as from promotions.
description: 战术奥地利火枪兵，每种姿势有不同益处，可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 利普卡鞑靼人
description_en: Quick firing Cavalry Archer from Lithuania.
description: 来自立陶宛的快速射击骑射手。

name: 阿坎安科比亚
description_en: Akan warrior firing a powerful old musket.
description: 阿坎战士使用的是威力强大的旧火枪。

name: 阿帕切骑兵
description_en: Ranged cavalry. Good against cavalry.
description: 远程骑兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 马普切掷石绳骑兵
description_en: Mapuche ranged cavalry who hurls bolas to slow down enemies and inflict area damage. Good against cavalry.
description: 马普切远程骑兵，会利用掷石绳来拖慢敌人的行动速度并造成范围伤害。擅长对付骑兵。

name: 贵族铁骑
description_en: Heavy Hand Cavalry from Wallachia with good siege attack.
description: 来自瓦拉几亚的重装近战骑兵，具有强大的攻城攻击能力。

name: 布伦瑞克黑衣士兵
description_en: Swift Musketeer. Good against Cavalry. Benefits from promotions.
description: 迅捷火枪兵。擅长对付骑兵。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 柏柏尔骆驼骑兵
description_en: Berber light cavalry warrior riding a fast camel that terrifies horses. Good against cavalry and artillery. Countered by light infantry.
description: 柏柏尔轻型骑兵战士驾驭着轻快的骆驼，能够惊吓马匹。擅长对付骑兵和炮兵，但会被轻型步兵反制。

name: 近卫轻骑兵
description_en: Ranged Light Cavalry with a deadly hand attack. Good against Heavy Cavalry.
description: 远程轻型骑兵，具有致命的近战攻击能力。擅长对付重装骑兵。

name: 鼓手
description_en: Military musician who can inspire military units to move and attack faster.
description: 能鼓舞军事单位更快移动和进攻的军乐家。

name: 雅典卫兵
description_en: Greek Skirmisher with high hitpoints that is particularly strong against Heavy Infantry.
description: 具有高生命值的希腊长枪兵，尤其反制重装步兵。

name: 霍尔坎标枪手
description_en: Archaic heavy infantry. Good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 古老的重装步兵，擅长攻击骑兵和建筑。

name: 阿兹特克豹勇士
description_en: Stealthy Aztec warrior armed with an obsidian sword. Good against cavalry and heavy infantry.
description: 可隐秘行动的阿兹特克战士，装备有黑曜石剑，擅长对付骑兵和重装步兵。

name: 莱纳佩战士
description_en: Native American Skirmisher that can stun enemy units at a distance with his war cry.
description: 美洲原住民长枪兵，可用战吼眩晕远处的敌方单位。

name: 线列步兵
description_en: Tactical Austrian Musketeer that gains different benefits in each stance as well as from promotions.
description: 战术奥地利火枪兵，每种姿势有不同益处，可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 利普卡鞑靼人
description_en: Quick firing Cavalry Archer from Lithuania.
description: 来自立陶宛的快速射击骑射手。

name: 马普切硬木持棍兵
description_en: Mapuche warrior with a large two-handed club.
description: 装备大型双手棍棒的马普切战士。

name: 山地兵
description_en: Bavarian Skirmisher that can spot enemies he recently damaged. Gains higher range and attack speed with Promotions.
description: 巴伐利亚长枪兵可以监视最近伤害过的敌人的位置。晋升后提升射程和攻击速度。

name: 徒步步兵
description_en: Skirmisher that can mount to become ranged cavalry. Good against Infantry and Light Cavalry. Benefits from promotions.
description: 可以上马成为远程骑兵的长枪兵。擅长对付步兵和轻型骑兵。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 骑马步兵
description_en: Ranged heavy cavalry that can dismount to become a Skirmisher. Good against Infantry. Benefits from promotions.
description: 远程重装骑兵，可以下马变为长枪兵。擅长对付步兵。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 纳瓦霍步枪兵
description_en: Stealthy Navajo skirmisher that runs quickly.
description: 可隐秘行动的纳瓦霍长枪兵，移动速度很快。

name: 柏柏尔游牧民族
description_en: Berber Villager that excels at gathering natural resources but is poor at agricultural gathering. Stronger and faster in groups.
description: 柏柏尔村民擅长收集自然资源，但不擅长农业收集。集群时会变得更强大、更快速。

name: 北方火枪兵
description_en: Devoted Musketeer from Northern Europe with low hitpoints but high damage. Benefits from Promotions.
description: 来自北欧的虔诚火枪兵，生命值较低但伤害很高。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 基齐勒巴什兵
description_en: Heavy Turkoman cavalry armed with lance and bow. Good against infantry.
description: 装备长矛和弓箭的重装土库曼骑兵，擅长对付步兵。

name: 皇家火绳枪兵
description_en: Swedish Skirmisher that can fight in the frontline thanks to his high hitpoints and melee damage. Benefits from Promotions.
description: 瑞典长枪兵，由于其高生命值和近战伤害，可以在前排作战。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 皇家枪骑兵
description_en: French elite Dragoon that hit targets at a higher range and performs well in melee combat. Can trample enemies. Good against cavalry.
description: 法国精锐枪骑兵，射程更远，在近战中表现出色。可以践踏敌人。擅长对付骑兵。

name: 皇家猎人
description_en: Danish Skirmisher that excels at countering other Skirmishers. Benefits from Villager combat upgrades.
description: 丹麦长枪兵，擅长反制其他长枪兵。可通过村民战斗力升级提升能力。

name: 皇家火枪兵
description_en: Royal Musketeer that will defend king and country with his sharp rapier in melee and charged pistol.
description: 皇家火枪兵，在近战中用锋利的西洋剑和蓄力手枪保卫国王和国家。

name: 萨克森胸甲骑兵
description_en: Heavy Saxon Hand Cavalry with high hitpoints and area damage.
description: 重装萨克森骑兵，拥有高生命值和范围伤害。

name: 塞米诺尔鲨齿弓箭手
description_en: Ranged Native American archer with a short range and high attack.
description: 美洲原住民远程步弓手单位，射程较短，但攻击力很高。

name: 突击骑士
description_en: Fast Serbo-Croatian Lancer with dual armor and a powerful lance charge attack. Benefits from promotions.
description: 快速的塞尔维亚-克罗地亚长矛骑兵，拥有双重装甲和强大的长枪蓄力攻击。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 索马里达鲁德民兵
description_en: Somali militiaman of the Darood clan. Specialized at countering artillery and ships.
description: 达鲁德族的索马里民兵。专门用来对付炮兵和船只。

name: 索马里伊萨战士
description_en: Heavy ranged Somali javelineer. Attacks closer targets faster. Counters cavalry from range.
description: 重装远程索马里标枪兵。可以快速攻击近距离的目标。能从远处反击骑兵。

name: 苏丹德尔维希
description_en: Fast Sudanese infantry which tosses knives from range to inflict melee damage. Attacks faster at close range. Good against heavy infantry, particularly in melee.
description: 快速苏丹步兵，可以从远处投掷飞刀造成近战伤害。在近距离的攻击速度更快。擅长对付重装步兵，近战攻击时特别强大。

name: 鞑靼步弓手
description_en: Light Tatar cavalry archer with high attack speed and a large bonus against all cavalry.
description: 轻型鞑靼骑射手，攻击速度快，对所有骑兵有大优势加成。

name: 骷髅轻骑兵
description_en: Fast German Hand Cavalry that charges its deadly sabre attack ability when attacking. Benefits from promotions.
description: 快速的德国近战骑兵，攻击时会为其致命的军刀攻击能力蓄力。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 亲随
description_en: Hand Infantry with high hitpoints that protects nearby allies by absorbing some of the inflicted damage.
description: 具有高生命值的近战步兵，通过吸收部分伤害来保护附近的盟友。

name: 翼骑兵
description_en: Fast heavy Polish elite cavalryman with extra attack range and a powerful Winged lance charge.
description: 快速重装波兰精锐卡努里骑兵，具有额外的攻击范围和强大的翼矛冲锋。

name: 约鲁巴奥约军团兵
description_en: Very powerful, but slow training heavy ranged javelin infantry. Attacks closer targets faster. Carries a large shield for extra protection against ranged attacks. Good against cavalry.
description: 非常强大，但训练缓慢的重装远程标枪步兵。攻击目标越近，攻击速度越快。携带一个大盾牌，可针对远程攻击提供额外保护。擅长对付骑兵。

name: 约鲁巴埃索骑兵
description_en: Quick-training and fast moving powerful lancer that slowly loses hitpoints. Attacks faster as he loses hitpoints.
description: 训练速度快、移动速度快并且威力强大的长矛骑兵，生命值会缓慢减少，攻击速度会随着生命值的减少而加快。

name: 山地兵
description_en: Bavarian Skirmisher that can spot enemies he recently damaged. Gains higher range and attack speed with Promotions.
description: 巴伐利亚长枪兵可以监视最近伤害过的敌人的位置。晋升后提升射程和攻击速度。

name: 徒步步兵
description_en: Skirmisher that can mount to become ranged cavalry. Good against Infantry and Light Cavalry. Benefits from promotions.
description: 可以上马成为远程骑兵的长枪兵。擅长对付步兵和轻型骑兵。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 骑马步兵
description_en: Ranged heavy cavalry that can dismount to become a Skirmisher. Good against Infantry. Benefits from promotions.
description: 远程重装骑兵，可以下马变为长枪兵。擅长对付步兵。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 柏柏尔游牧民族
description_en: Berber Villager that excels at gathering natural resources but is poor at agricultural gathering. Stronger and faster in groups.
description: 柏柏尔村民擅长收集自然资源，但不擅长农业收集。集群时会变得更强大、更快速。

name: 北方火枪兵
description_en: Devoted Musketeer from Northern Europe with low hitpoints but high damage. Benefits from Promotions.
description: 来自北欧的虔诚火枪兵，生命值较低但伤害很高。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 基齐勒巴什兵
description_en: Heavy Turkoman cavalry armed with lance and bow. Good against infantry.
description: 装备长矛和弓箭的重装土库曼骑兵，擅长对付步兵。

name: 皇家火绳枪兵
description_en: Swedish Skirmisher that can fight in the frontline thanks to his high hitpoints and melee damage. Benefits from Promotions.
description: 瑞典长枪兵，由于其高生命值和近战伤害，可以在前排作战。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 皇家枪骑兵
description_en: French elite Dragoon that hit targets at a higher range and performs well in melee combat. Can trample enemies. Good against cavalry.
description: 法国精锐枪骑兵，射程更远，在近战中表现出色。可以践踏敌人。擅长对付骑兵。

name: 皇家骑兵
description_en: Guard cavalry mercenary riding a heavy war horse that damages units while moving.
description: 护卫雇佣骑兵骑着重装战马，可在移动时对单位造成伤害。

name: 皇家猎人
description_en: Danish Skirmisher that excels at countering other Skirmishers. Benefits from Villager combat upgrades.
description: 丹麦长枪兵，擅长反制其他长枪兵。可通过村民战斗力升级提升能力。

name: 皇家狩猎者
description_en: Danish Counter Skirmisher and Villager that can only hunt and gather from huntable animals.
description: 丹麦反制长枪兵和村民，只能狩猎和采集可狩猎的动物。

name: 皇家火枪兵
description_en: Royal Musketeer that will defend king and country with his sharp rapier in melee and charged pistol.
description: 皇家火枪兵，在近战中用锋利的西洋剑和蓄力手枪保卫国王和国家。

name: 萨克森胸甲骑兵
description_en: Heavy Saxon Hand Cavalry with high hitpoints and area damage.
description: 重装萨克森骑兵，拥有高生命值和范围伤害。

name: 突击骑士
description_en: Fast Serbo-Croatian Lancer with dual armor and a powerful lance charge attack. Benefits from promotions.
description: 快速的塞尔维亚-克罗地亚长矛骑兵，拥有双重装甲和强大的长枪蓄力攻击。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 非洲民兵
description_en: Powerful well-drilled African musketeer mercenary ready to restore order.
description: 训练有素的非洲雇佣火枪兵威力强大，他们准备着恢复这片大陆的秩序。

name: 索马里达鲁德民兵
description_en: Somali militiaman of the Darood clan. Specialized at countering artillery and ships.
description: 达鲁德族的索马里民兵。专门用来对付炮兵和船只。

name: 索马里伊萨战士
description_en: Heavy ranged Somali javelineer. Attacks closer targets faster. Counters cavalry from range.
description: 重装远程索马里标枪兵。可以快速攻击近距离的目标。能从远处反击骑兵。

name: 莱纳佩战士
description_en: Native American Skirmisher that can stun enemy units at a distance with his war cry.
description: 美洲原住民长枪兵，可用战吼眩晕远处的敌方单位。

name: 村民
description_en: Villager that gathers resources.
description: 收集资源的村民。

name: 非洲民兵
description_en: Powerful well-drilled African musketeer mercenary ready to restore order.
description: 训练有素的非洲雇佣火枪兵威力强大，他们准备着恢复这片大陆的秩序。

name: 苏丹德尔维希
description_en: Fast Sudanese infantry which tosses knives from range to inflict melee damage. Attacks faster at close range. Good against heavy infantry, particularly in melee.
description: 快速苏丹步兵，可以从远处投掷飞刀造成近战伤害。在近距离的攻击速度更快。擅长对付重装步兵，近战攻击时特别强大。

name: 森纳尔骑兵
description_en: Heavy hand cavalry mercenary from Sudan with many hitpoints and dual armor. Good against light infantry and artillery.
description: 来自苏丹的重装近战雇佣骑兵，生命值较高并且身穿双重装甲。擅长对付轻型步兵和炮兵。

name: 鞑靼步弓手
description_en: Light Tatar cavalry archer with high attack speed and a large bonus against all cavalry.
description: 轻型鞑靼骑射手，攻击速度快，对所有骑兵有大优势加成。

name: 腾格里狼
description_en: A tamed wolf that obeys you and is good against treasure guardians and other pets.
description: 一只服从您命令的狼，性情温驯，擅长对付宝藏守护者和其他宠物。

name: 骷髅轻骑兵
description_en: Fast German Hand Cavalry that charges its deadly sabre attack ability when attacking. Benefits from promotions.
description: 快速的德国近战骑兵，攻击时会为其致命的军刀攻击能力蓄力。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 亲随
description_en: Hand Infantry with high hitpoints that protects nearby allies by absorbing some of the inflicted damage.
description: 具有高生命值的近战步兵，通过吸收部分伤害来保护附近的盟友。

name: 翼骑兵
description_en: Fast heavy Polish elite cavalryman with extra attack range and a powerful Winged lance charge.
description: 快速重装波兰精锐卡努里骑兵，具有额外的攻击范围和强大的翼矛冲锋。

name: 约鲁巴奥约军团兵
description_en: Very powerful, but slow training heavy ranged javelin infantry. Attacks closer targets faster. Carries a large shield for extra protection against ranged attacks. Good against cavalry.
description: 非常强大，但训练缓慢的重装远程标枪步兵。攻击目标越近，攻击速度越快。携带一个大盾牌，可针对远程攻击提供额外保护。擅长对付骑兵。

name: 约鲁巴埃索骑兵
description_en: Quick-training and fast moving powerful lancer that slowly loses hitpoints. Attacks faster as he loses hitpoints.
description: 训练速度快、移动速度快并且威力强大的长矛骑兵，生命值会缓慢减少，攻击速度会随着生命值的减少而加快。

name: 内夫特尼亚步枪兵
description_en: Skirmisher with high hitpoints. Good against heavy infantry and light ranged cavalry.
description: 拥有高生命值的长枪兵。擅长对付重装步兵和轻型远程骑兵。

name: 新军燧枪兵
description_en: Exceptionally well-drilled ranged infantry that specializes in utilizing the advantages of different formations.
description: 训练有素的远程步兵，擅长利用不同阵型的优势。

name: 双刃剑手
description_en: Specialized Light Infantry that only counters other Light Infantry, but does so very effectively.
description: 特种轻型步兵，只能反制其他轻型步兵，但效果十分显著。

name: 教宗重型火炮
description_en: Papal Artillery that absorbs some of the damage inflicted to your nearby Artillery. Good against Infantry.
description: 教宗炮兵能吸收您附近炮兵所承受的部分伤害。擅长对付步兵。

name: 教宗长矛骑兵
description_en: Papal heavy cavalry that absorbs some of the damage inflicted to nearby allied cavalry. Counters all Infantry.
description: 教宗重装骑兵能吸收附近的骑兵盟友所承受的部分伤害。反制所有步兵。

name: 教宗义勇军
description_en: Papal ranged infantry with high hitpoints that absorbs some of the damage inflicted to nearby allied ranged infantry. Performs well against all units. Countered by Artillery.
description: 高生命值的教宗远程步兵能吸收附近的远程步兵盟友所承受的部分伤害。在对抗所有单位时表现出色。受炮兵反制。

name: 法令斯步枪兵
description_en: Skirmisher good against infantry
description: 长枪兵单位，擅长对付步兵

name: 军团箭船
description_en: Armored, but fast Galley. Good at exploring, fishing and transport. Gains an attack boost after sinking enemy Ships.
description: 箭船被装甲覆盖，但移速快。适用于进行探索、捕鱼或运输。在击沉敌方船只后获得攻击力加成。

name: 奥罗莫战士
description_en: Powerful heavy cavalry with a charged musket attack and a rapid melee attack. Good against infantry.
description: 强大的重装骑兵，可使用蓄力火枪攻击与快速近战攻击，擅长对付步兵。

name: 沙漠步弓手
description_en: Skilled archer from the desert with a long range to hit distant targets, but also shoots fast at short range. Good against heavy infantry.
description: 来自沙漠的老练步弓手，射程远，可以击中远处目标，在近处时可以快速拉弓射箭。擅长对付重装步兵。

name: 沙漠突袭者
description_en: Plundering Desert Raider. Good against buildings.
description: 掠夺成性的沙漠突袭者。擅长对付建筑。

name: 沙漠战士
description_en: Hardy javelin warrior equipped with a large shield. The shield grants different armor types when switching combat stances. Good against cavalry.
description: 装备有大盾牌的强壮标枪战士。盾牌在切换战斗姿态时提供不同的护甲类型。擅长对付骑兵。

name: 随军神父
description_en: Heroic Mexican Priest. Explores, fights, builds Cathedrals and Trading Posts. Cannot die. If he falls unconscious, he can be rescued.
description: 英勇墨西哥神父。他会探索、战斗、建造教堂和交易站。他不会死亡，当他因昏迷而倒下时，您可以派人去救他。

name: 教宗护卫
description_en: Papal hand infantry that protects nearby allies by absorbing some of the inflicted damage. Can hook enemies with his halberd to slow them down.
description: 教宗近战步兵通过吸收部分伤害来保护附近的盟友。可以用长戟钩住敌人，减缓敌人速度。

name: 墙盾手
description_en: Italian Crossbowman equipped with a large shield providing high hitpoints. The shield grants different armor types when switching combat stances. Good against Heavy Infantry and Light Ranged Cavalry.
description: 意大利弩手装备大盾牌，生命值高。在切换战斗姿态时，盾牌会提供不同的装甲类型。擅长对付重装步兵和轻装远程骑兵。

name: 野蛮野猪鲍尔
description_en: A soft but coarse boar, likes being scratched on the back. Good against Treasure Guardians.
description: 一头温和但丑陋的野猪，喜欢被人挠背。适合对付宝藏守护者。

name: 宠物棕熊
description_en: A pet brown bear that loves salmon and is good against guardians.
description: 一头爱吃鲑鱼的宠物棕熊，擅长对付守护者。

name: 温驯的大象艾兹
description_en: An exceptionally intelligent elephant who enjoys surprises. Good against Treasure Guardians.
description: 一只喜欢惊喜又特别聪明的大象，擅长攻击宝藏守护者。

name: 俏皮的河马尼莉
description_en: A playful hippo with a big personality. Good against Treasure Guardians.
description: 一只个性鲜明的俏皮河马，擅长攻击宝藏守护者。

name: 温驯的豹子萨努拉
description_en: A nimble leopard who likes to play with baby gazelles. Good against Treasure Guardians.
description: 一只喜欢和小瞪羚玩耍的敏捷豹，擅长攻击宝藏守护者。

name: 温驯的疣猪潘布
description_en: A gentle warthog with few worries. Good against Treasure Guardians.
description: 一只无忧无虑的温驯疣猪，擅长攻击宝藏守护者。

name: 女祭司
description_en: Heals injured units and converts enemy units.
description: 治疗受伤的单位并招降敌方单位。

name: 拉斯
description_en: Royal Ethiopian hero with a fealty aura. Explores, fights, builds Palaces, Mountain Monasteries, and Trading Posts. Good against infantry.
description: 带有忠诚光环的埃塞俄比亚皇室英雄。可用于探索、战斗、建造宫殿、山地寺院和交易站。擅长对付步兵。

name: 拉斯
description_en: Royal Ethiopian hero with a fealty aura. Explores, fights, builds Palaces, Mountain Monasteries, and Trading Posts. Good against infantry.
description: 带有忠诚光环的埃塞俄比亚皇室英雄。可用于探索、战斗、建造宫殿、山地寺院和交易站。擅长对付步兵。

name: 木制假炮
description_en: Decoy unit which deals no damage but can take the shape of any common artillery. Good to distract the enemy and to attract enemy fire.
description: 无法造成伤害的诱饵单位，但可以被做成任何常见火炮的外形。适合用于干扰敌军，吸引敌方火力。

name: 突袭者
description_en: Mobile Hand Cavalry with decent siege damage. Good against light infantry and villagers.
description: 攻城伤害俱佳的机动近战骑兵。擅长对付轻型步兵和村民。

name: 游骑兵
description_en: British skirmisher. Equipped with a rifle to counter Heavy Infantry more effectively, but has less range.
description: 英国长枪兵，装备有步枪，可以更有效地对付重装步兵，但射程较短。

name: 正规军
description_en: Heavy ranged infantry with greater range than other Musketeers. Armed with a bayonet to beat cavalry.
description: 拥有比其他火枪兵更远射程的重装远程步兵，装备有刺刀，可以反制骑兵。

name: 归化的火绳枪骑兵
description_en: Heavy cavalry mercenary with a powerful short ranged attack.
description: 可在近距离展开强力攻击的重装雇佣骑兵。

name: 海盗神射手
description_en: Corsair skirmisher armed with a Kabyle musket to ambush infantry, villagers, and rival pirates.
description: 海盗长枪兵配备一把卡拜尔火枪，可伏击步兵、村民和敌对海盗。

name: 巴巴里战士
description_en: Pirate from the Barbary Coast.
description: 巴巴里海岸的海盗。

name: 加利福尼亚西裔兵
description_en: Ranged Cavalry with a Lasso ability. Good against cavalry.
description: 拥有套索能力的远程骑兵，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 佛郎加农炮
description_en: Light mobile cannon that can fire and reposition quickly. Good against infantry and ships.
description: 便捷的轻型加农炮，可以快速开火并调整位置。擅长对付步兵和船。

name: 克鲁佐布步兵
description_en: Cruzob Musketeer that counters cavalry from range
description: 克鲁佐布火枪兵，可以从远程反制骑兵

name: 军事冒险家
description_en: Freewheeling heavy infantry on an unauthorized military expedition. Constructs buildings or destroys them with dynamite.
description: 越权出征的非正规军重装步兵，可建造建筑或用炸药摧毁它们。

name: 高乔人
description_en: Cavalry that hurls bolas which can slow down enemies. Gathers from livestock and builds Livestock Pens.
description: 利用掷石绳的骑兵，可降低敌方单位的速度。可从牲畜中收集资源并建造畜栏。

name: 骑马近卫掷弹兵
description_en: Ranged cavalry with a powerful grenade attack. Very effective against buildings.
description: 远程骑兵，可展开强大的手榴弹攻击。非常擅长攻击建筑。

name: 巴西护卫
description_en: A dangerous outlaw on horseback armed with a rifle. Effective against Heavy Cavalry and Heavy Infantry.
description: 危险的骑马亡命之徒，装备有步枪。擅长对付重装骑兵和重装步兵。

name: 爪哇长矛兵
description_en: Resilient Javanese rebel armed with a spiked bamboo spear to defeat cavalry.
description: 装备带刺竹矛的爪哇叛军，不屈不挠地攻击骑兵。

name: 平原人
description_en: Hand cavalry with a powerful lance attack. Very effective against infantry.
description: 能够释放强力长矛攻击的近战骑兵。非常擅长攻击步兵。

name: 曼科‧印卡
description_en: The leader of your Tribe. Possesses many powerful bonuses and abilities. Explores, fights, builds Town Centers, Strongholds and Tambos.
description: 部落领袖，拥有许多强大的加成效果和能力。可以用来探险、战斗、建造城镇中心、大本营和印加驿站。

name: 民兵
description_en: Quick-training ranged infantryman who quickly loses hitpoints, becoming less effective over time. Good against Siege troopers.
description: 训练速度快的远程步兵，但生命值会随时间快速减少，攻击力也会随之下降。擅长对付攻城山地兵。

name: 原住民村民
description_en: Villager that constructs buildings and gathers resources.
description: 建造建筑和收集资源的村民。

name: 原住民村民
description_en: Villager that constructs buildings and gathers resources.
description: 建造建筑和收集资源的村民。

name: 埃克莱尔
description_en: French mounted scout who knows the area. Good against artillery, infantry and mercenaries.
description: 熟悉该地区的法国侦察骑兵。擅长对付炮兵、步兵和雇佣兵。

name: 海盗
description_en: A dangerous Pirate who is quick on his feet. Ideal for early raids. Good against skirmishers and artillery.
description: 行动迅速的危险海盗，适合早期掠夺，擅长对付长枪兵和炮兵。

name: 长途马车
description_en: Can be garrisoned by Villagers for transport and protection. Becomes faster and stronger the more units are garrisoned.
description: 村民可以在此驻扎，进行运输和防卫。驻扎的单位越多就越牢固，移动速度也越快。

name: 革命军狙击手
description_en: Skirmisher with low hitpoints, but a strong attack. Good against infantry.
description: 长枪兵，生命值较低，但是攻击力强大，并且擅长对付步兵。

name: 皮衣牛仔
description_en: Heavy lance cavalry wrapped in sturdy leather and armed with a revolver. Good against artillery and skirmishers. Can gather from livestock and build Livestock Pens.
description: 重装长矛骑兵身上包裹着结实的皮革，并且装备左轮手枪。擅长对付炮兵和长枪兵。可从牲畜中收集资源并建造畜栏。

name: 祖国志愿者
description_en: Solid general-purpose infantry. Good against cavalry.
description: 优良的全方位步兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 狙击手
description_en: Skirmisher with a long-ranged attack, but low hitpoints. Gains extra range per upgrade. Good against infantry.
description: 可以进行远程攻击的长枪兵，但是生命值较低。每次升级都会进一步增加射程。擅长对付步兵。

name: 尉官
description_en: Russian junior officer. Heavy hand infantry with a large attack.
description: 俄国低阶军官，重装近战步兵单位，攻击力强。

name: 俄国重装步兵
description_en: Affordable Russian musketeer. Armed with a bayonet to beat cavalry.
description: 高性价比俄国火枪兵，装备有一把刺刀来攻击骑兵。

name: 神圣军团步兵
description_en: Revolutionary Greek musketeer that is stronger in groups. Good against cavalry.
description: 希腊革命火枪兵，成群结队时更强大。擅长对付骑兵。

name: 强盗
description_en: A dangerous outlaw with a gun, strong against Heavy Infantry.
description: 一名危险的亡命之徒，装备有枪，非常擅长对付重装步兵。

name: 牛仔
description_en: A dangerous outlaw on horseback.
description: 骑马的危险亡命之徒。

name: 克罗地亚骑兵
description_en: Fast light ranged cavalry that performs well against all units. Counters Heavy Cavalry in hand combat. Benefits from promotions.
description: 迅捷的轻型远程骑兵，在对抗所有单位时表现出色。在近战中反制重装骑兵。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 法外之徒
description_en: A dangerous outlaw with a pistol.
description: 危险的亡命之徒，装备有手枪。

name: 持枪杀手
description_en: A dangerous outlaw with a pistol.
description: 危险的亡命之徒，装备有手枪。

name: 法外之徒
description_en: Popular outlaw armed with a rifle. Good against other skirmishers. Benefits from promotions.
description: 装备步枪的常见亡命之徒。擅长对付其他长枪兵。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 拦路强盗
description_en: Outlaw armed with two pistols. Can mount a horse to turn into ranged cavalry. Good against Cavalry.
description: 装备有两把手枪的亡命之徒。可以上马成为远程骑兵。擅长对付骑兵。

name: 拦路强盗
description_en: Mounted Outlaw armed with a pistol. Can also use a deadly charged rifle attack and dismount from his horse. Good against Cavalry.
description: 骑马的亡命之徒，装备有一把手枪。也可以使用致命的蓄力步枪攻击以及下马。擅长对付骑兵。

name: 审判官
description_en: Sinister priest who spies and heals in the name of faith. Inflicts burning damage.
description: 邪恶牧师，以信仰的名义进行侦查和治疗。造成燃烧伤害。

name: 非洲流浪汉
description_en: A dangerous outcast.
description: 一个危险的被流放者。

name: 马拉塔火兵
description_en: Light artillery that throws fire bombs to destroy buildings.
description: 轻型炮兵单位，会投掷燃烧弹来摧毁建筑。

name: 强盗吹箭手
description_en: Short-ranged missile unit that fires poison darts. Good against infantry.
description: 短程射击单位，可以发射有毒的飞镖，擅长对付步兵。

name: 海盗
description_en: A pirate in the New World.
description: 新世界的海盗。

name: 殖民地掠夺者
description_en: Defeat this guardian to collect its Treasure.
description: 打败此守护者即可收集宝藏。

name: 哥萨克蛮兵
description_en: Heavy ranged Cossack infantry from the Wild Fields armed with a pistol and sharp saber. Can throw a deadly knife during fights and mount to turn into hand cavalry.
description: 来自荒野的哥萨克重装远程步兵，装备有手枪和锋利的军刀。在战斗中可以投掷致命的飞刀，并可以上马成为近战骑兵。

name: 哥萨克蛮兵
description_en: Fast Cossack hand cavalry from the Wild Fields with a powerful lance attack that charges while fighting. Can dismount.
description: 来自荒野的哥萨克快速近战骑兵，攻击时可以蓄力发动强大的长矛攻击。可以下马。

name: 飞刀手
description_en: East African warrior that throws knives. Good against cavalry.
description: 投掷飞刀的东非战士。擅长对付骑兵。

name: 逃犯
description_en: A dangerous outlaw with a gun, strong against Heavy Infantry.
description: 一名危险的亡命之徒，装备有枪，非常擅长对付重装步兵。

name: 牲畜盗贼
description_en: A dangerous outlaw on horseback.
description: 骑马的危险亡命之徒。

name: 塞巴斯托波迫击炮
description_en: Gargantuan mortar which annihilates units and buildings. Slow and expensive.
description: 可摧毁单位和建筑的巨型迫击炮。生产速度缓慢并且成本昂贵。

name: 村民
description_en: Villager that constructs buildings and gathers resources.
description: 建造建筑和收集资源的村民。

name: 拓荒者
description_en: Villager that constructs buildings and gathers resources.
description: 建造建筑和收集资源的村民。

name: 弯刀勇士
description_en: Fast moving shock infantry that attacks quickly with two curved swords. Good against light infantry.
description: 快速移动的突击步兵，用两把弯刀快速攻击。擅长对抗轻型步兵。

name: 投石索兵
description_en: Ranged infantry that inflicts siege damage. Good against Artillery and Infantry.
description: 造成围攻破坏的远程步兵。擅长对付炮兵和步兵。

name: 单桅战船
description_en: Sloop. Small and nimble warship. Good at exploring, fishing or transport.
description: 单桅战船，一种小型轻便的军舰，适合用于探索、捕鱼或运输。

name: 墨西哥士兵
description_en: Very sturdy, but slow training, Heavy Infantry armed with a musket and grenades.
description: 非常强壮、但训练缓慢的重装步兵，装备有火枪和手榴弹。

name: 拓荒者
description_en: Villager that constructs buildings and gathers resources.
description: 建造建筑和收集资源的村民。

name: 城市护卫
description_en: Archaic archer who quickly loses hitpoints if not within a City State. Becomes stronger with every age.
description: 古老的步弓手若未处于城邦内，会很快失去生命值。随着时代的变迁会更为强大。

name: 海盗船
description_en: Corsair Ship. Warship flying the Barbary corsair flag.
description: 巴巴里海盗船。悬挂着巴巴里海盗旗的军舰。

name: 哥萨克骑兵
description_en: Russian hand cavalry.
description: 俄罗斯近战骑兵。

name: 标枪骑兵
description_en: Ranged cavalry. Good against cavalry.
description: 远程骑兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 重型火炮
description_en: Ottoman super-heavy artillery. Moves and fires slowly, but does tremendous damage against infantry or buildings.
description: 奥斯曼超重装炮兵单位，虽然移动和开火的速度都很慢，但会对步兵和建筑造成巨大的伤害。

name: 索马里火绳枪兵
description_en: Skirmisher with low hitpoints, but a long-ranged attack. Good against infantry.
description: 长枪兵，生命值较低，但是攻击范围广，并且擅长对付步兵。

name: 长矛兵
description_en: Archaic heavy infantry. Good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 古老的重装步兵，擅长攻击骑兵和建筑。

name: 奥斯曼火枪兵
description_en: Powerful heavy Ottoman musket infantry with a lot of hitpoints.
description: 强大的奥斯曼重装火枪步兵，生命值非常高。

name: 卡萨‧海卢
description_en: Gifted, intrepid warrior and a champion of the Ethiopian people.
description: 才华横溢且英勇无畏的战士，同时是埃塞俄比亚人民坚定的拥护者。

name: 艾哈迈德‧曼苏尔
description_en: Brother of the Moroccan sultan. Leads the cavalry forces of the Moroccan army.
description: 摩洛哥苏丹的兄弟。领导摩洛哥军队的骑兵部队。

name: 民兵军官
description_en: Officer of the Canadian Militia.
description: 加拿大的民兵军官。

name: 城市护卫
description_en: Archaic archer who quickly loses hitpoints if not within a City State. Becomes stronger with every age.
description: 古老的步弓手若未处于城邦内，会很快失去生命值。随着时代的变迁会更为强大。

name: 老练俄国重骑兵
description_en: Fast cavalry good at raiding villagers or buildings.
description: 行动快速的骑兵单位，擅长对付村民或攻击建筑。

name: 亡命之徒德国步兵
description_en: Flamboyant German heavy infantry mercenary.
description: 花哨的德国重装雇佣步兵。

name: 亡命火枪兵
description_en: Heavy ranged infantry. Armed with a bayonet to beat cavalry.
description: 重装远程步兵，装备有一把刺刀来攻击骑兵。

name: 长矛兵
description_en: Archaic heavy infantry. Good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 古老的重装步兵，擅长攻击骑兵和建筑。

name: 私掠船
description_en: Privateer. Mercenary warship.
description: 私掠船，雇佣兵军舰。

name: 划艇
description_en: Rowboat. Small oar-powered boat carrying a sharpshooter. Can fight but is better suited for stealth missions.
description: 划艇：运载一名狙击手的小型桨动力船。拥有战斗能力，但更适合执行隐匿任务。

name: 弯刀勇士
description_en: Fast armored warrior. Good against skirmishers and artillery.
description: 身穿护甲并且行动迅速的战士，擅长对付长枪兵和炮兵。

name: 俄国长枪兵
description_en: Weak but cheap skirmisher. Good against infantry.
description: 攻击力较弱但是训练成本较低的长枪兵，擅长对付步兵。

name: 正规军
description_en: Solid general-purpose infantry. Good against cavalry.
description: 优良的全方位步兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 志愿军
description_en: Skirmisher with low hitpoints, but a strong attack. Good against infantry.
description: 长枪兵，生命值较低，但是攻击力强大，并且擅长对付步兵。

name: 募集长矛兵
description_en: Quick-training, Spearman who quickly loses hitpoints, becoming less effective over time.
description: 训练速度快的长矛兵，但生命值会随时间快速减少，攻击力也会随之下降。

name: 穆赫比尔
description_en: Sneaky assassin. Highly effective against mercenaries and heroes such as Explorers. Attacks faster with less hitpoints and benefits from promotions.
description: 鬼鬼祟祟的刺客。非常擅长对付雇佣兵与英雄 (如探险家) 。攻击速度更快，生命值更低，可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 勇敢的私掠船
description_en: Privateer. Mercenary warship.
description: 私掠船，雇佣兵军舰。

name: 州民兵
description_en: Skirmisher with low range that sacrifices attack for hitpoints. Gains additional hitpoints in groups.
description: 射程较短的长枪兵，其牺牲了攻击力来加强生命值，在集群时还会增加生命值。

name: 隐匿炸药筒
description_en: Petard with the ability to use stealth.
description: 具有隐匿能力可使用的炸药筒。

name: 汽轮
description_en: Steamer. Powerful, steam-propelled warship resistant to building fire that can train unique units, construct docks and gather fish.
description: 汽轮，这种由蒸汽推进的强大军舰可以抵挡敌人从建筑中发起的攻击，还可以训练独特单位、建造码头和捕鱼。

name: 莱昂纳多的战车
description_en: Armored vehicle with cannons pointing in all directions. Let's have a ride on the merry-go-round!
description: 装甲车，装备有可指向四面八方的加农炮。让我们在旋转木马上兜兜风吧！

name: 骷髅轻骑兵护卫
description_en: Fast German Hand Cavalry that charges its deadly sabre attack ability when attacking. Benefits from promotions.
description: 快速的德国近战骑兵，攻击时会为其致命的军刀攻击能力蓄力。可通过晋升提升能力。

name: 阿兹特克鹰勇士
description_en: Aztec infantry that flings javelins from an atlatl. Good against Cavalry and Hand Shock Infantry.
description: 阿兹特克步兵，会用掷矛器掷射标枪，擅长对付骑兵及近战突击步兵。

name: 阿兹特克豹勇士
description_en: Stealthy Aztec warrior armed with an obsidian sword. Good against cavalry and heavy infantry.
description: 可隐秘行动的阿兹特克战士，装备有黑曜石剑，擅长对付骑兵和重装步兵。

name: 清教徒
description_en: Hardy settler that constructs buildings and gathers resources.
description: 吃苦耐劳的拓荒者，可以建造建筑和收集资源。

name: 卡宾枪骑兵
description_en: Ranged light cavalry equipped with a carbine repeater. Good against Heavy Cavalry and Artillery.
description: 装备有连射卡宾枪的远程轻型骑兵。擅长对付重装骑兵和炮兵。

name: 后备民兵
description_en: Quick-training, Minuteman who quickly loses hitpoints, becoming less effective over time.
description: 训练速度快的后备民兵，但生命值会随时间快速减少，攻击力也会随之下降。

name: 都卜勒武士
description_en: Heavy swordsman with a sweep attack.
description: 能发起扫荡攻击的重装剑士。

name: 枪骑兵
description_en: Ranged cavalry. Good against cavalry.
description: 远程骑兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 使者
description_en: Dutch reconnaissance unit with a good line that benefits from villager upgrades.
description: 荷兰的侦察单位，优势在于可以由村民升级而成。

name: 探险家
description_en: The hero of your civilization. Explores, fights, builds Town Centers and Trading Posts. Cannot die. If he falls unconscious, he can be rescued.
description: 您文明的英雄，他会探索、战斗、建造城镇中心和交易站。他不会死亡，当他因昏迷而倒下时，您可以派人去救他。

name: 鹰炮
description_en: Light artillery. Better against infantry than buildings.
description: 轻型炮兵单位，擅长对付步兵，对建筑的攻击力稍差。

name: 渔船
description_en: Gathers Food from Fish or Coin from Whales.
description: 从鱼群捕鱼或从鲸鱼收集钱币。

name: 毛毛
description_en: No, we didn't make it up. We sort of wish we had.
description: 不，这不是我们编造的。我们倒是有点希望是我们编的。

name: 三桅战船
description_en: Fluyt. Slow, powerful ship resistant to building fire that can train units.
description: 三桅战船。行动缓慢，但威力强大的船只，不但可以抵抗敌人从建筑中发起的攻击，还能训练单位。

name: 会飞的紫貘
description_en: You were expecting maybe a hippo or something?
description: 您原本是不是期待会出现河马啊？

name: 护卫舰
description_en: Frigate. Heavy war ship.
description: 护卫舰，重型军舰。

name: 大型战舰
description_en: Galleon. Slow, powerful ship resistant to building fire that can train units.
description: 大型战舰。行动缓慢，但威力强大的船只，不但可以抵抗敌人从建筑中发起的攻击，还能训练单位。

name: 箭船
description_en: Galley. Good at exploring, fishing or transport.
description: 箭船，适用于进行探索、捕鱼或运输。

name: 乔治‧“垮”盛顿
description_en: "Check in your wallet. That's me on the dollar bill."
description: “看看你的钱包，一美元钞票上的人就是我。”

name: 重型火炮
description_en: Ottoman super-heavy artillery. Moves and fires slowly, but does tremendous damage against infantry or buildings.\nCan only be trained at the Factory or shipped from the Home City.
description: 奥斯曼超重装炮兵单位，虽然移动和开火的速度都很慢，但会对步兵和建筑造成巨大的伤害。\n只能在工厂训练，或从主城运送过来。

name: 掷弹兵
description_en: Heavy siege infantryman that throws grenades to defeat infantry or buildings.
description: 重型攻城步兵单位，投掷手榴弹来攻击步兵或建筑。

name: 老练长戟兵
description_en: Slow, heavy infantry with a large attack.
description: 行动缓慢的重装步兵单位，攻击力强。

name: 轻骑兵
description_en: Hand cavalry armed with cold steel. Good against light infantry.
description: 装备锋利武器的近战骑兵单位，擅长对付轻型步兵。

name: 法兰克叔叔
description_en: Uncle Frank
description: 法兰克叔叔

name: 疯马
description_en: Famous Lakota leader.
description: 著名的拉科塔领袖。

name: 伊玛目
description_en: Heals injured units.
description: 治疗受伤的单位。

name: 奥斯曼火枪兵
description_en: Powerful heavy Ottoman musket infantry with a lot of hitpoints.
description: 强大的奥斯曼重装火枪步兵，生命值非常高。

name: 老练长矛骑兵
description_en: Heavy cavalry armed with a lance for killing infantry.
description: 装备长矛的重装骑兵，擅长对付步兵。

name: 镭射熊
description_en: Equipped with lazer (tm) vision, a teleporter belt, and monkeys, man, monkeys.
description: 配备了镭射 (TM) 视力、传送腰带，还有猴子、人类、猴子。

name: 利尔厉
description_en: "That's the last time I take Joe to buy frames with me."
description: “那是我最后一次带乔跟我去购买框架。”

name: 加特林骆驼
description_en: No, we didn't make it up
description: 不，这不是我们编造的。

name: 长弓兵
description_en: Archaic long-ranged archer. Good against infantry.
description: 古老的远程步弓手单位，擅长对付步兵。

name: 中型火炮
description_en: Slow, heavy artillery that launches large rodents. Nostalgia from AOE catapults.
description: 速度缓慢的重装炮兵，可发射大型啮齿动物。为纪念《帝国时代》中的投石车而设计。

name: 巴巴里海盗
description_en: Pirate mercenary from the Barbary Coast.
description: 巴巴里海岸的海盗雇佣兵。

name: 黑骑士
description_en: Heavily armed German mercenary cavalry armed with pistols.
description: 装备手枪的重装德国雇佣骑兵。

name: 埃尔梅蒂长矛骑兵
description_en: Heavy cavalry armed with a lance. Good against infantry.
description: 装备长矛的重装骑兵单位，擅长对付步兵。

name: 燧枪兵
description_en: Powerful ranged infantry mercenary which counters all Cavalry from range.
description: 强大的远程步兵雇佣兵，可以在远距离上克制所有骑兵。

name: 里尔火炮雇佣兵
description_en: Powerful heavy artillery from the foundries of Europe.
description: 来自欧洲铸造厂的强大重装炮兵单位。

name: 刀骑兵
description_en: Heavy cavalry mercenary from Finland.
description: 来自芬兰的重装雇佣骑兵。

name: 高地兵
description_en: Powerful Musketeer from Scotland.
description: 威力强大的火枪兵，来自苏格兰。

name: 德国步枪兵
description_en: Hessian skirmisher mercenary. Good against infantry.
description: 赫斯长枪雇佣兵，擅长对付步兵。

name: 德国步兵
description_en: Flamboyant German heavy infantry mercenary.
description: 花哨的德国重装雇佣步兵。

name: 马穆鲁克
description_en: Bold cavalry mercenary from Egypt.
description: 来自埃及的英勇的雇佣骑兵。

name: 满洲兵
description_en: Chinese cavalry archer mercenary.
description: 中国的骑射手雇佣兵。

name: 忍者
description_en: Japanese assassin. Highly effective against mercenaries, Explorers, War Chiefs, and Monks.
description: 日本刺客，非常擅长对付雇佣兵、探险家、战酋和僧侣。

name: 浪人
description_en: Japanese Samurai mercenary who lost his master.
description: 没有主人的日本武士雇佣兵。

name: 巴尔干骑兵
description_en: Hand cavalry mercenary from the Balkans.
description: 来自巴尔干半岛的近战雇佣骑兵。

name: 瑞士长矛兵
description_en: Elite Swiss mercenary armed with a pike. Good against cavalry.
description: 精锐的瑞士雇佣兵，装备有一根长矛，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 民兵
description_en: Quick-training ranged infantryman who quickly loses hitpoints, becoming less effective over time. Good against Siege troopers.
description: 训练速度快的远程步兵，但生命值会随时间快速减少，攻击力也会随之下降。擅长对付攻城山地兵。

name: 传教士
description_en: Unique Spanish healer with a speedy mount. Doesn’t cost population.
description: 骑着迅捷坐骑的独特西班牙治疗者。不会占用人口。

name: 迫击炮战船
description_en: Monitor. Mortar ship good at bombarding buildings at great range.
description: 迫击炮战船，装备迫击炮的船只，擅长从远距离炮轰建筑。

name: 大安迪
description_en: Andy's coming to crush you!
description: 安迪要来压垮您了！

name: 汤米卡车
description_en: Watch out for Tommy. He's a maniac.
description: 千万要小心汤米。他是个疯子。

name: 迫击炮
description_en: Artillery that fires an exploding shell at buildings or ships.
description: 发射爆炸弹的炮兵单位，擅长攻击建筑或船只。

name: 火枪兵
description_en: Heavy ranged infantry. Armed with a bayonet to beat cavalry.
description: 重装远程步兵，装备有一把刺刀来攻击骑兵。

name: 阿帕切骑兵
description_en: Ranged cavalry. Good against cavalry.
description: 远程骑兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 拉科塔斧骑兵
description_en: Lakota horseman armed with an axe.
description: 装备一把斧头的拉科塔骑手。

name: 拉科塔托卡拉士兵
description_en: Elite Lakota horsemen.
description: 精锐拉科塔骑兵。

name: 图皮黑檀木步弓手
description_en: Long-range, accurate native archer. Good against infantry.
description: 射程长、精准度较高的原住民步弓手，擅长对付步兵。

name: 加勒比伏击兵
description_en: Elite Carib blowgunner that can be quickly trained.
description: 可以快速训练的精锐加勒比吹箭手。

name: 加勒比吹箭手
description_en: Short-ranged missile unit that fires poison darts. Good against infantry.
description: 短程射击单位，可以发射有毒的飞镖，擅长对付步兵。

name: 克丘亚掷石绳战士
description_en: Quechua ranged infantry that hurls bolas for a wide area of effect.
description: 克丘亚远程步兵，会猛力投出掷石绳，攻击范围较广。

name: 夏安骑兵
description_en: Cheyenne horseman armed with a spear. Good against other Cavalry.
description: 夏安骑兵配备长矛。擅长对付其他骑兵。

name: 努特卡持棍兵
description_en: Nootka warrior armed with a wooden club.
description: 装备一根木棍的努特卡战士。

name: 努特卡战酋
description_en: Elite Nootka warrior.
description: 精锐努特卡战士。

name: 阿兹特克鹰勇士
description_en: Aztec infantry that flings javelins from an atlatl. Good against Cavalry and Hand Shock Infantry.
description: 阿兹特克步兵，会用掷矛器掷射标枪，擅长对付骑兵及近战突击步兵。

name: 玛雅蛇矛兵
description_en: Maya barbed spearmen. Good against cavalry or buildings.
description: 装备有刺长矛的玛雅长矛兵，擅长对付骑兵或攻击建筑。

name: 卡曼契骑马弓兵
description_en: Comanche ranged cavalry. Good against cavalry.
description: 卡曼契远程骑兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 克丘亚标枪手
description_en: Quechua infantry armed with a plumed spear. Good against cavalry.
description: 装备羽饰长矛的克丘亚步兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 休伦防弹盾
description_en: Huron short-ranged siege unit.
description: 休伦短程攻城单位。

name: 原住民侦察兵
description_en: A native scout who knows the area. Good for exploration and against mercenaries.
description: 熟悉该地区的原住民侦察员。擅长探索和对抗雇佣兵。

name: 阿兹特克豹勇士

description: 可隐秘行动的阿兹特克战士，装备有黑曜石剑，擅长对付骑兵和重装步兵。

description_en: Klamath skirmisher versed in a wide range of trades. Can pick up treasures and slowly gather from all natural resources except mines and huntable animals.
description: 克拉马斯长枪兵所精通贸易，可捡起宝藏，也可慢慢从自然资源中（除矿山和可狩猎动物以外）进行收集。

name: 萨波特克闪电战士
description_en: Zapotec warrior armed with a shield and a sword to counter Infantry and Cavalry.
description: 萨波特克战士配备盾牌和剑，可对抗步兵和骑兵。

name: 豪德诺索尼防弹盾
description_en: Haudenosaunee short-ranged siege unit.
description: 豪德诺索尼短程攻城单位。

name: 马普切硬木持棍兵
description_en: Mapuche warrior with a large two-handed club.
description: 装备大型双手棍棒的马普切战士。

name: 治疗者

description: 治疗受伤的单位。

name: 图皮黑檀木步弓手

description: 射程长、精准度较高的原住民步弓手，擅长对付步兵。

name: 加勒比吹箭手
description_en: Short-ranged missile unit that fires poison darts. Good against infantry.
description: 短程射击单位，可以发射有毒的飞镖，擅长对付步兵。

name: 夏安骑兵
description_en: Cheyenne horseman armed with a spear.
description: 配备长矛的夏安骑兵。

name: 努特卡持棍兵
description_en: Nootka warrior armed with a wooden club.
description: 装备一根木棍的努特卡战士。

name: 玛雅蛇矛兵
description_en: Maya barbed spearmen. Good against cavalry or buildings.
description: 装备有刺长矛的玛雅长矛兵，擅长对付骑兵或攻击建筑。

name: 卡曼契骑马弓兵
description_en: Comanche ranged cavalry. Good against cavalry.
description: 卡曼契远程骑兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 休伦防弹盾
description_en: Huron short-ranged siege unit.
description: 休伦短程攻城单位。

name: 萨波特克闪电战士
description_en: Zapotec warrior armed with a shield and a sword to counter Infantry and Cavalry.
description: 萨波特克战士配备盾牌和剑，可对抗步兵和骑兵。

name: 切罗基步枪兵

name: 克里追踪者
description_en: Cree rifleman with a good line of sight and long range.
description: 视野极佳且射程远的克里步枪兵。

name: 纳瓦霍步枪兵
description_en: Stealthy Navajo skirmisher that runs quickly.
description: 可隐秘行动的纳瓦霍长枪兵，移动速度很快。

name: 切罗基步枪兵
description_en: Cherokee skirmisher that is accurate at long range.
description: 切罗基长枪兵，长距离攻击时精准度较高。

name: 塞米诺尔鲨齿弓箭手
description_en: Ranged Native American archer with a short range and high attack.
description: 美洲原住民远程步弓手单位，射程较短，但攻击力很高。

name: 豪德诺索尼战斧兵
description_en: Haudenosaunee warrior that hurls tomahawks into battle.
description: 豪德诺索尼战士，会用力投掷战斧来战斗。

name: 克里追踪者
description_en: Cree rifleman with a good line of sight and long range.
description: 视野极佳且射程远的克里步枪兵。

name: 老练俄国重骑兵
description_en: Fast cavalry good at raiding villagers or buildings.
description: 行动快速的骑兵单位，擅长对付村民或攻击建筑。

name: 风琴炮
description_en: Artillery that fires multiple projectiles. Better against infantry than buildings.
description: 可以发射多发炮弹的炮兵，擅长对付步兵，对建筑的攻击力则稍差。

name: 温柔的宠物熊皮特
description_en: A pet black bear who loves honey and is good against guardians

name: 宠物美洲狮毛毛
description_en: A tame cougar that is good against guardians.
description: 一只驯服的美洲狮，擅长对付守护者。

name: 温驯的郊狼毒牙
description_en: A tame coyote that is good against guardians.
description: 一只驯服的郊狼，擅长对付守护者。

name: 宠物灰熊汉丘
description_en: A pet grizzly bear that loves salmon and is good against guardians.
description: 一头爱吃鲑鱼的宠物灰熊，擅长对付守护者。

name: 宠物美洲豹珍妮
description_en: A tame jaguar that is good against guardians.
description: 一只驯服的美洲豹，擅长对付守护者。

name_en: Big Jerome the Tame Polar Bear
name: 温驯的北极熊大杰罗姆
description_en: A pet polar bear that loves to eat baby seals and is good against guardians
description: 一头爱吃幼海豹的宠物北极熊，擅长对付守护者。

name: 温驯的公狼巴克
description_en: A tame wolf that obeys you and is good against wild predators.
description: 一只服从您命令的狼，性情温驯，擅长对付野生捕食性动物。

name: 长矛兵
description_en: Archaic heavy infantry. Good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 古老的重装步兵，擅长攻击骑兵和建筑。

name: 清教徒
description_en: Hardy settler that constructs buildings and gathers resources.
description: 吃苦耐劳的拓荒者，可以建造建筑和收集资源。

name: 神父
description_en: Heals injured units.
description: 治疗受伤的单位。

name: 私掠船
description_en: Privateer. Mercenary warship.
description: 私掠船，雇佣兵军舰。

name: 火箭炮
description_en: Heavy artillery that fires a rocket and is good against infantry or buildings.\nCan only be trained at the Factory or shipped from the Home City.
description: 发射火箭炮的重装炮兵单位，擅长对付步兵或建筑。\n只能在工厂训练，或从主城运送过来。

name: 兰朵武士
description_en: Fast-moving sword and buckler infantry.
description: 装备剑和盾牌的步兵单位，移动速度快。

name: 大型加农炮
description_en: Powerful Russian heavy artillery.
description: 威力强大的俄罗斯重装炮兵单位。

name: 荷兰枪骑兵
description_en: Ranged cavalry armed with pistols. Good against cavalry and artillery.
description: 装备手枪的远程骑兵单位，擅长对付骑兵和炮兵。

name: 枪手
description_en: A dangerous outlaw with a pistol.
description: 危险的亡命之徒，装备有手枪。

name: 短枪商人骑兵

description: 骑马的危险亡命之徒。

name: 叛兵
description_en: A dangerous outlaw with a gun, strong against Heavy Infantry.
description: 一名危险的亡命之徒，装备有枪，非常擅长对付重装步兵。

name: 海盗
description_en: A dangerous Pirate who is quick on his feet. Ideal for early raids. Good against skirmishers and artillery.
description: 行动迅速的危险海盗，适合早期掠夺，擅长对付长枪兵和炮兵。

name: 拓荒者
description_en: Villager that constructs buildings and gathers resources.
description: 建造建筑和收集资源的村民。

name: 村民
description_en: Villager that gathers resources.
description: 收集资源的村民。

name: 拓荒者马车
description_en: A German villager that is more expensive but gathers faster than a Settler.
description: 德国村民，生产成本较高，但采集资源的速度比拓荒者要快。

name: 长枪兵
description_en: Skirmisher with low hitpoints, but a long-ranged attack. Good against infantry.
description: 长枪兵，生命值较低，但是攻击范围广，并且擅长对付步兵。

name: 突厥骑射
description_en: Powerful cavalry available only from the Home City.
description: 威力强大的骑兵单位，但只能从主城运送过来。

name: 阿兹特克酋长
description_en: A leader among the Aztec.
description: 阿兹特克人的一位领袖。

name: 海盗
description_en: A pirate in the New World.
description: 新世界的海盗。

name: 切罗基步弓手
description_en: Long-range, accurate Cherokee archer.
description: 射程长、准确度较高的切罗基步弓手。

name: 美洲原住民酋长
description_en: A leader among the Cherokee.
description: 切罗基人的一位领袖。

name: 切罗基骑马弓兵
description_en: A Cherokee horse archer. Good against cavalry.
description: 切罗基骑马弓兵，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 格雷塔
description_en: This is the only remaining daughter of the Lakota Chief. She has a great personality.
description: 这是拉科塔酋长唯一幸存的女儿，她有着高尚的人格。

name: 法兰克叔叔
description_en: Uncle Frank
description: 法兰克叔叔

name: 凶猛的美洲狮
description_en: A hungry cougar that will attack on sight.
description: 一只饥饿的美洲狮，它会攻击它看到的所有东西。

name: 火战船
description_en: Rams anything on the water and explodes.
description: 撞击水面上的任何东西，并且进行探索。

name: 帝国护卫舰
description_en: Heavy warship.
description: 重型军舰。

name: 火环兵
description_en: Knights of Malta that throw flaming hoops at Janissaries.
description: 向奥斯曼火枪兵投掷火环的马耳他骑士。

name: 莉丝的旗舰

description: 莉丝的旗舰，以她最不喜欢的城市而命名。

name: 狼勇士酋长

description: 夏安酋长。

name: 巨熊酋长
description_en: A Cheyenne chief.
description: 夏安酋长。

name: 双月酋长
description_en: A Cheyenne chief
description: 夏安酋长。

name: 疯马
description_en: Famous Lakota leader.
description: 著名的拉科塔领袖。

name: 防卫据点加农炮
description_en: Powerful heavy artillery.
description: 威力强大的重装炮兵单位。

name: 殖民地民兵
description_en: A soldier who can gather Wood, but not other resources. He looks cold.
description: 能收集木材，但不能收集其他资源的士兵。他似乎冷得不停发抖。

name: 俄国长枪兵
description_en: Weak but cheap skirmisher. Good against infantry.
description: 攻击力较弱但是训练成本较低的长枪兵，擅长对付步兵。

name: 军医
description_en: Heals injured units. Can build Field Hospitals.
description: 可治疗受伤的单位。还可以建造军医院。

name: 德国骑兵
description_en: Hand cavalry that sacrifices hitpoints for attack.
description: 近战骑兵单位，牺牲了自己的生命值来加强攻击力。

name: 战犬
description_en: War Dog. A fierce canine that obeys commands.
description: 战犬。一种凶猛好斗但服从命令的犬类。

name: 老练马战车
description_en: Hussite horse-drawn wagon outfitted with cannon.
description: 由胡斯马拉动的马车，上面装备有加农炮。

name: 白美洲豹
description_en: A servant of the Circle of Ossus.

name: 艾那弓箭步兵

description: 部落领袖，拥有许多强大的加成效果和能力。可以用来探险、战斗、建造城镇中心和交易站。

name: 弓骑士

name: 托卡拉士兵

description: 装备斧头的近战骑兵。擅长对付炮兵。

name: 装甲军舰
description_en: Ironclad. Advanced armored warship.
description: 装甲军舰，拥有先进装甲的军舰。

name: 战酋

description: 部落领袖，拥有许多强大的加成效果和能力。可以用来探险、战斗、建造城镇中心和交易站。

name: 豹游荡武士
description_en: Stealthy noble armed with an obsidian sword. Good against cavalry and heavy infantry.
description: 可隐秘行动的贵族单位，装备有黑曜石剑，擅长对付骑兵和重装步兵。

name: 战酋
description_en: The leader of your Tribe. Possesses many powerful bonuses and abilities. Explores, fights, builds Town Centers and Trading Posts.
description: 部落领袖，拥有许多强大的加成效果和能力。可以用来探险、战斗、建造城镇中心和交易站。

name: 轻型加农炮
description_en: Light artillery. Good against infantry and artillery.
description: 轻型炮兵单位，擅长对付步兵和炮兵。

name: 奥托米掷石绳兵
description_en: Slinger. Good against heavy infantry.
description: 投石手，擅长对付重装步兵。

name: 精锐防弹盾
description_en: Tough Haudenosaunee support unit used to shield your army from enemy fire.
description: 强悍的豪德诺索尼支援单位，可以用来保护军队不受敌方炮火攻击。

name: 治疗者
description_en: Heals injured units and can work at the Community Plaza.
description: 可治疗受伤的单位并在社区广场工作。

name: 战斗祭司
description_en: Heals injured units and are also effective in combat. Warrior Priests are extremely effective when occupying the Community Plaza.
description: 战斗祭司不但能治疗受伤单位，战斗力也不错。此外，他们在社区广场进行仪式时效果非常好。

name: 火枪骑兵
description_en: Ranged cavalry. Good against cavalry.
description: 远程骑兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 森林游荡者
description_en: Stealthy ranged infantry. Good against infantry and in an ambush.
description: 可隐秘行动的远程步兵，擅长对付步兵和突袭敌人。

name: 炸药筒
description_en: Siege warrior that dies when it attacks buildings, but does lots of damage.
description: 攻击建筑后会死亡的攻城战士，但会造成大量伤害。

name: 硝化甘油炸药筒
description_en: Siege warrior that dies when it attacks buildings, but does lots of damage.
description: 攻击建筑后会死亡的攻城战士，但会造成大量伤害。

name: 美洲狮长矛兵
description_en: Warrior armed with a deadly spear. Good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 装备有致命长矛的战士，擅长对付骑兵和建筑。

name: 精锐攻城槌

description: 攻城战士，擅长攻击建筑。

name: 步枪骑士
description_en: Ranged cavalry that are effective against cavalry, heavy infantry, and artillery.
description: 远程骑兵单位，擅长对付骑兵、重装步兵及炮兵。

name: 骷髅武士
description_en: Aztec elite berserker.

name: 殖民地民兵

description: 轻型步兵单位，生命值低，但射程很长。擅长对付步兵。

name: 间谍

description: 鬼鬼祟祟的刺客，非常擅长对付雇佣兵、探险家、战酋和僧侣。

name: 雨神独木舟

description: 建造多艘即可在海战时拥有强大的攻击力。

name: 战斧兵

description: 在战斗中挥舞战斧的豪德诺索尼战士。擅长对付骑兵。

name: 鹰神弓箭手
description_en: Foot archer. Good against infantry.
description: 步弓手单位，擅长对付步兵。

name: 战斗独木舟
description_en: Strong in naval combat when built in numbers.
description: 建造多艘即可在海战时拥有强大的攻击力。

name: 持棍战士
description_en: Foot warrior armed with a deadly club. Good against cavalry.
description: 装备致命棍棒的步兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 瓦其那步枪兵
description_en: Light infantry with low hitpoints, but a long-ranged attack. Good against infantry.
description: 轻型步兵单位，生命值低，但射程很长。擅长对付步兵。

name: 战士
description_en: Quick-training Native defender who quickly loses hitpoints, becoming less effective over time.
description: 训练速度快的原住民防御者，但生命值会随时间快速减少，攻击力也会随之下减。

name: 火绳枪兵
description_en: Chinese foot soldier armed with a rifle. Good against infantry.
description: 装备步枪的中国步兵单位。擅长对付步兵。

name: 日本火枪步兵

description_en: Archaic heavy infantry. Good against cavalry and buildings.

name: 清正大名

name: 战象
description_en: Indian Heavy War Elephant powerful in close combat. Inflicts area damage. Good against archers and skirmishers.
description: 印度重型战象单位，在近距离战斗中威力强大，可造成区域性伤害，擅长对付步弓手和长枪兵。

name: 藤盾兵
description_en: Fast Chinese warrior armed with a shield and a sword. Heavily armored and good against archers, skirmishers, and artillery.
description: 装备剑盾的中国战士，移动速度快，身穿重型装甲，擅长对付步弓手、长枪兵和炮兵。

name: 薙刀僧兵
description_en: Japanese warrior Monk armed with a naginata. Good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 装备薙刀的日本僧侣战士，擅长攻击骑兵和建筑。

name: 虎爪兵
description_en: Indian warrior armed with sharp claws. Good against infantry.
description: 装备锐爪的印度战士，擅长对付步兵。

name: 战象
description_en: Indian Heavy War Elephant powerful in close combat. Inflicts area damage. Good against archers and skirmishers.
description: 印度重型战象单位，在近距离战斗中威力强大，可造成区域性伤害，擅长对付步弓手和长枪兵。

name: 旧汉军
description_en: Well-rounded army of archers and pikemen.\n3 Chu Ko Nu: Archaic archers good against infantry.\n3 Qiang Pikemen: Archaic hand infantry good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 由步弓手和长矛兵单位组成的一支全面军队。\n3 名中国连弩兵：古老的步弓手单位，擅长对付步兵。\n3 名中国长矛兵：古老的近战步兵单位，擅长对付骑兵和建筑。

name: 旧汉军 (颐和园)
description_en: Well-rounded army of archers and pikemen.\n3 Chu Ko Nu: Archaic archers good against infantry.\n3 Qiang Pikemen: Archaic hand infantry good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 由步弓手和长矛兵单位组成的一支全面军队。\n3 名中国连弩兵：古老的步弓手单位，擅长对付步兵。\n3 名中国长矛兵：古老的近战步兵单位，擅长对付骑兵和建筑。

name: 虎鲸
description_en: Defeat this guardian to collect its treasure.
description: 打败此守护者即可收集宝藏。

name: 哨兵
description_en: Quick-training, Pikeman who quickly loses hitpoints, becoming less effective over time.
description: 训练速度快的长矛兵，但生命值会随时间快速减少，攻击力也会随之下降。

name: 宠物巨蜥克蒙德
description_en: A tame monitor lizard that is good against guardians.
description: 一只驯服的巨蜥，擅长对付守护者。

name: 宠物狮子洛塔
description_en: A tame lion that is good against guardians.
description: 一只驯服的狮子，擅长对付守护者。

name: 老猩猩道格
description_en: A pet orangutan that likes hanging out in trees and is good against guardians.
description: 一只爱吊在树上的宠物猩猩，擅长对付守护者。

name: 温驯的熊猫皮皮
description_en: A pet panda that loves bamboo and is good against guardians.
description: 一头爱吃竹子的宠物熊猫，擅长对付守护者。

name: 宠物犀牛兰迪
description_en: A pet rhino that likes grass and is good against guardians.
description: 一只喜欢吃草的宠物犀牛，擅长对付守护者。

name: 宠物猴子嘟波
description_en: A pet monkey that likes to wash his food and is good against guardians.
description: 一只爱洗食物的宠物猴，擅长对付守护者。

name: 宠物猕猴费利塔
description_en: A pet monkey that likes bananas and is good against guardians.
description: 一只爱吃香蕉的宠物猕猴，擅长对付守护者。

name: 温顺的老虎艾希尔特
description_en: A tame tiger that is good against guardians.
description: 一只驯服的老虎，擅长对付守护者。

name: 宠物白虎华格纳
description_en: A tame tiger with white coloration that is good against guardians and shock infantry.
description: 一只驯服的白色斑纹老虎，擅长对付守护者和突击步兵。

name: 中国长矛兵
description_en: Foot warrior armed with a pike. Good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 装备长枪的步兵单位，擅长攻击骑兵和建筑。

name: 拉杰普特人
description_en: Fast-moving sword gauntlet infantry. Good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 行动快速的持剑步兵单位，擅长对付骑兵和建筑。

name: 曼萨卜达尔拉杰普特人
description_en: Inspires all nearby Rajputs. Fast-moving sword gauntlet infantry. Good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 可鼓舞附近的拉杰普特人，是移动快速的持剑步兵单位，擅长攻击骑兵和建筑。

name: 归化的火兵
description_en: Mercenary light artillery that throws fire bombs to destroy buildings. Also good against infantry.
description: 轻型雇佣炮兵单位，可投掷燃烧弹来摧毁建筑，而且还擅长对付步兵。

name: 归化的巴巴里海盗
description_en: Pirate mercenary from the Barbary Coast.
description: 巴巴里海岸的海盗雇佣兵。

name: 归化的黑骑士
description_en: Heavily armed German mercenary cavalry armed with pistols.
description: 装备手枪的重装德国雇佣骑兵。

name: 归化的僧侣
description_en: A Monk with keen senses. Good against infantry.
description: 感觉敏锐的僧侣，擅长对付步兵。

name: 归化的土匪
description_en: A dangerous Indian highwayman armed with a pistol.
description: 危险的印度拦路强盗，装备有手枪。

name: 归化的埃尔梅蒂长矛骑兵
description_en: Heavy cavalry armed with a lance. Good against infantry.
description: 装备长矛的重装骑兵单位，擅长对付步兵。

name: 归化的燧枪兵
description_en: Powerful ranged infantry mercenary.
description: 威力强大的远程雇佣步兵。

name: 归化的里尔火炮雇佣兵
description_en: Powerful heavy artillery from the foundries of Europe.
description: 来自欧洲铸造厂的强大重装炮兵单位。

name: 归化的刀骑兵
description_en: Heavy cavalry mercenary from Finland.
description: 来自芬兰的重装雇佣骑兵。

name: 归化的高地兵
description_en: Powerful Musketeer from Scotland.
description: 威力强大的火枪兵，来自苏格兰。

name: 归化的铁军
description_en: Mercenary foot archer from China that wears heavy armor. Good against infantry.
description: 中国雇佣步弓手单位，身穿重型护甲，而且擅长对付步兵。

name: 归化的德国步枪兵
description_en: Hessian skirmisher mercenary. Good against infantry.
description: 赫斯长枪雇佣兵，擅长对付步兵。

name: 归化的札特长矛骑兵
description_en: An elite Indian mercenary armed with a lance. Good against archers, skirmishers, and artillery.
description: 装备有长矛的精锐印度雇佣兵，擅长对付步弓手、长枪兵和炮兵。

name: 归化的德国步兵
description_en: Flamboyant German heavy infantry mercenary.
description: 花哨的德国重装雇佣步兵。

name: 归化的马穆鲁克
description_en: Bold cavalry mercenary from Egypt.
description: 来自埃及的英勇的雇佣骑兵。

name: 归化的满洲兵
description_en: Chinese cavalry archer mercenary.
description: 中国的骑射手雇佣兵。

name: 归化的忍者
description_en: Japanese assassin. Highly effective against mercenaries, Explorers, and War Chiefs.
description: 日本刺客，非常擅长对付雇佣兵、探险家和战酋。

name: 归化的枪手
description_en: A dangerous outlaw with a pistol.
description: 危险的亡命之徒，装备有手枪。

name: 归化的短枪商人骑兵
description_en: A dangerous outlaw on horseback.
description: 骑马的危险亡命之徒。

name: 归化的叛兵
description_en: A dangerous outlaw with a rifle.
description: 危险的亡命之徒，装备有步枪。

name: 归化的海盗
description_en: A dangerous Pirate.
description: 危险的海盗。

name: 归化的浪人
description_en: A Japanese swordsman with no master. Good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 没有主人的日本剑客，擅长攻击骑兵和建筑。

name: 归化的倭寇海盗
description_en: An Eastern pirate in search of booty. Good against cavalry and buildings.
description: 搜刮战利品的东方海盗，擅长攻击骑兵和建筑。

name: 归化的巴尔干骑兵

description: 来自巴尔干半岛的近战雇佣骑兵。

name: 归化的瑞士长矛兵
description_en: Elite Swiss mercenary armed with a pike. Good against cavalry.
description: 精锐的瑞士雇佣兵，装备有一根长矛，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 归化的暴徒
description_en: A dangerous Indian thug armed with a rifle.
description: 一名危险的印度恶棍，装备有步枪。

name: 归化的骑兵
description_en: A nomadic horseman. Good against cavalry.
description: 游牧骑兵，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 归化的倭寇浪人
description_en: An Eastern swordsman with no master.
description: 没有主人的一名西方剑客。

name: 归化的保镖
description_en: Heavily armed mercenary cavalry good with both a bow and a sword. Good against cavalry.
description: 重装雇佣骑兵单位，擅长使用弓和剑，而且擅长对付骑兵。

name: 印度兵
description_en: Indian heavy ranged infantry with a powerful attack and many hitpoints.
description: 印度重装远程步兵，具有强大的攻击力，生命值很高。

name: 曼萨卜达尔印度兵
description_en: Inspires all nearby Sepoys. Powerful Indian heavy infantry that has a large bonus against cavalry at melee.
description: 鼓舞附近的所有印度兵。威力强大的印度重装步兵，擅长近战攻击骑兵。

name: 村民
description_en: Villager that gathers resources.
description: 收集资源的村民。

name: 村民
description_en: Villager that gathers resources.
description: 收集资源的村民。

name: 印度教村民
description_en: An Indian villager that does not eat livestock. Gathers all other resources.
description: 印度村民不吃牲畜，但会收集所有其他资源。

name: 村民
description_en: A Japanese villager that does not eat meat. Gathers all other resources.
description: 日本村民不吃肉，但会收集所有其他资源。

name: 密探
description_en: Stealthy ranged infantry. Good against infantry.
description: 可隐秘行动的远程步兵，擅长对付步兵。

name: 德川幕府将军
description_en: Supreme ruler of Japan. Can train troops and receive Shipments. Also gives nearby troops extra hitpoints.\nShogun can only be shipped from the Home City, after which they can be retrained at the Shogunate wonder.
description: 日本的最高统治者，可以训练部队、接收船运，并能给予附近部队额外的生命值。\n幕府将军只能从主城运送过来，之后可以在幕府奇观中再次进行训练。

name: 攻城大象
description_en: Elephant armed with a cannon. Good against artillery and buildings.
description: 装备有加农炮的大象，擅长攻击炮兵和建筑。

name: 曼萨卜达尔攻城大象
description_en: Inspires all nearby Siege Elephants. Elephant armed with a  cannon. Good against artillery and buildings.
description: 可鼓舞附近的所有攻城大象。装备有加农炮的大象，擅长攻击炮兵和建筑。

name: 印度重装骑兵

description: 骑骆驼的印度近战骑兵单位，擅长对付步弓手、长枪兵和炮兵。

name: 曼萨卜达尔印度重装骑兵
description_en: Inspires all nearby Sowars. Indian hand cavalry that rides a camel. Good against archers, skirmishers, and artillery.
description: 可鼓舞附近的印度重装骑兵，是骑乘骆驼的印度近战骑兵单位，擅长对付步弓手、长枪兵和炮兵。

name: 弓箭武士
description_en: Long-ranged noble that fires flaming arrows. Good against artillery and buildings.
description: 可发射火焰之箭的远程贵族单位，擅长对付炮兵和建筑。

name: 火兵

description: 轻型炮兵单位，会投掷燃烧弹来摧毁建筑。

name: 婆罗门治疗者

name: 加藤清正大名
description_en: Extremely powerful Japanese lord who trains troops and receive Shipments.
description: 势力极其强大的日本领主，可训练部队并接收船运。

name: 伊达政宗大名
description_en: Extremely powerful Japanese lord who trains troops and receive Shipments.
description: 势力极其强大的日本领主，可训练部队并接收船运。

name: 细川忠兴大名

name: 石田大名
description_en: Extremely powerful Japanese lord who can train troops and receive Shipments.
description: 势力极其强大的日本领主，可训练部队并接收船运。

name: 没人骑的大象
description_en: This Elephant has no rider and is out of control.
description: 因为没有骑手而变得失控的大象。

name: 正规军
description_en: Anti-infantry army of archers and heavy cavalry.\n3 Chu Ko Nu: Archaic archers good against infantry.\n2 Steppe Riders: Hand cavalry good against villagers and buildings.
description: 由步弓手和重装骑兵单位组成的一支反骑兵军队。\n3 名中国连弩兵：古老的步弓手单位，擅长对付步兵。\n2 名草原骑兵：近战骑兵单位，擅长攻击村民和建筑。

name: 正规军 (颐和园)

description: 由步弓手和重装骑兵单位组成的一支反骑兵军队。\n3 名中国连弩兵：古老的步弓手单位，擅长对付步兵。\n2 名草原骑兵：近战骑兵单位，擅长攻击村民和建筑。

description: 行动快速的骑兵单位，擅长对付村民或攻击建筑。

name: 铁甲船
description_en: Tekkousen. Heavy warship.
description: 铁甲船，重型军舰。

name: 防卫军
description_en: Well-rounded army of swordsmen and riflemen.\n3 Changdao: Hand infantry good against cavalry and buildings.\n3 Arquebusier: Ranged infantry good against infantry and light cavalry.
description: 由剑兵和步枪兵组成的全面军队。\n3 名长刀兵：近战步兵单位，擅长攻击骑兵和建筑。\n3 名火绳枪兵：远程步兵单位，擅长对付步兵和轻型骑兵。

name: 防卫军 (颐和园)

name: 马拉塔暴徒
description_en: A dangerous Indian thug armed with a rifle.
description: 一名危险的印度恶棍，装备有步枪。

name: 软剑兵
description_en: Uses a sword whip that does area damage. Regenerates hitpoints when idle. Good against heavy infantry. Available only from the Home City.
description: 可使用可造成区域性伤害的剑鞭。在空闲时会恢复生命值。擅长对付重装步兵，但只能从主城运送过来。

name: 曼萨卜达尔软剑兵

name: 倭寇军队

name: 倭寇僧侣
description_en: A Monk with keen senses. Good against infantry.
description: 感觉敏锐的僧侣，擅长对付步兵。

name: 倭寇帆船
description_en: Wokou Junk. Mercenary warship.
description: 倭寇帆船，属于雇佣兵军舰。

name: 倭寇海盗
description_en: An Eastern pirate in search of booty. Good against villagers and skirmishers.

name: 倭寇骑兵

description: 游牧骑兵，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 倭寇浪人

name: 山伏

description: 装备大型双手棍棒的日本僧侣单位，擅长攻击骑兵和建筑。

name: 日本长弓兵
description_en: Ranged infantry armed with the Japanese longbow. Good against infantry.
description: 装备日本长弓的远程步兵单位，擅长对付步兵。

name: 骆驼骑兵
description_en: Ranged camel cavalry. Good against cavalry.
description: 远程骆驼骑兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。

name: 曼萨卜达尔骆驼骑兵
description_en: Inspires all nearby Zamburak. Ranged camel cavalry. Good against cavalry.
description: 可鼓舞附近的所有骆驼骑兵，远程的骆驼骑兵单位，擅长对付骑兵。
